# cTID credentials - cTrader ID

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/managing-ctid/credentials/#change-ctid-username)

cTID credentials
================

To change your cTID username, email or password, navigate to the [**Credentials**](https://id.ctrader.com/my/settings/credentials)
 tab of the cTID website.

Change cTID username[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/managing-ctid/credentials/#change-ctid-username "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Enter a new name in the **New username** field and click **Change username** to update your cTID username.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/change-username-ctid.png)

Your username is changed immediately.

Change email[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/managing-ctid/credentials/#change-email "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

To modify the email linked with your cTID, enter a new email address in the **New email** field and then click **Change email**.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/change-email-ctid.png)

Note

A confirmation message will be sent to your old email address. Once you confirm the action, you will be redirected to the cTID website, where another confirmation message will be sent to your new email address. Open the message in your new email and confirm the request.

Change password[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/managing-ctid/credentials/#change-password "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

To modify your cTID password, enter your current password and a new password (twice) in the corresponding fields.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/change-password-ctid.png)

Your password is changed immediately.

Warning

If you forgot your password and cannot access the cTID website, simply [**reset your password**](https://id.ctrader.com/reset)
. Alternatively, you can click **Forgot password** in any cTrader application. We have a separate guide detailing how to [**reset a cTID password**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/managing-ctid/reset-ctid-password/)
.

Back to top

---

# UI operations - cTrader Algo

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/guides/ui/#ui-operations)

UI operations[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/guides/ui/#ui-operations "Permanent link")

==================================================================================================

cTrader offers several UI-related solutions to algo developers:

*   **Chart controls** - are interactive feature-rich [**WPF-like**](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/visualstudio/designers/getting-started-with-wpf?view=vs-2022)
     API members that you can use to create controls overlayed on cTrader charts. Through these controls, users can interact with your cBots and indicators.
*   **Chart objects** - encompass various technical analysis tools and related UI elements. Typically, you can draw them on a chart using either C# code or the cTrader built-in chart tools.
*   **WinForms** - you can use [**.NET WinForms**](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/desktop/winforms/?view=netdesktop-6.0)
     in your cTrader cBots and indicators. To simplify work with WinForms, we encourage you to use the Visual Studio WinForms designer.
*   **WPF** - cBots, plugins and indicators also support WPF. We encourage using this option only if you are familiar with C# and .NET.

Note

WinForms and WPF only work if you are running and developing cTrader algos on a Windows machine.

Back to top

---

# Introduction - WebView Plugins

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/webview-plugins/#introduction)

Warning

This feature is in pre-release and currently under testing. Documentation is for reference only.

Introduction[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/webview-plugins/#introduction "Permanent link")

=========================================================================================

WebView (WV) plugins are versatile web-based services that integrate seamlessly across cTrader Mobile, Web, Windows and Mac apps, extending the platform UI and functionality.

WebView plugins in one minute!

*   WV plugins support trading decisions and personalise your space by delivering useful services such as trading assistants, technical analysis widgets, symbol dashboards and more.
    
*   Creators develop web apps hosted on external websites that interact with cTrader through a dedicated SDK.
    
*   cTrader users can build WV plugins in cTrader Web, Windows or Mac and publish them directly in cTrader Store, reaching millions of traders. Optionally, they can add WV plugins only to their cTrader apps and share them via Invite, attributing other traders.
    
*   Traders can effortlessly add WV plugins from cTrader Store, and they will be available across all their cTrader apps due to cloud synchronisation.
    

Explore WV plugins in [**cTrader Store**](https://ctrader.com/webview-plugins)
. Popular examples include:

*   AI assistants
*   Trade calculators
*   Interactive dashboards
*   Pattern recognition trainers
*   Hashtag-based newsfeeds
*   Technical analysis widgets
*   Forex cross-rates tools
*   Symbol notes
*   And more

MobileWeb and desktop

![](https://help.ctrader.com/webview-plugins/img/getting-started/web-view-plugins-sample-promo.png)

![](https://help.ctrader.com/webview-plugins/img/getting-started/webview-plugins-sample-desktop-windows.png)

WebView plugins expand the cTrader ecosystem and differ from [**desktop plugins**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/plugins)
 in several ways.

| Aspect | WebView plugins | Desktop plugins |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Solution | Web-based | Native |
| cTrader apps | Mobile, Web, Windows, Mac | Windows, Mac |
| Distribution method | cTrader Store, cTrader Invite | cTrader Store, cTrader Invite, files |

Back to top

---

# Introduction - cTrader Store

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/#introduction)

Introduction[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/#introduction "Permanent link")

=======================================================================================

[**cTrader Store**](https://ctrader.com/)
 is a secure and dynamic marketplace that connects buyers and sellers of trading products.

cTrader Store in one minute!

*   Any user with a [**cTrader ID**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/)
     can enter cTrader Store and obtain both free and paid trading products with a 14-day money-back period.
*   Store [**buyers**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/how-tos/buy-a-product/)
     can instantly start cBots in Cloud and install WebView plugins, all without leaving their mobile device.
*   Store [**sellers**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/how-tos/publish-a-product/)
     can upload their products directly from Cloud or as files, making it quick to publish them.
*   By reaching millions of cTrader users worldwide, sellers gain rich monetisation opportunities in Store without marketing effort.
*   cTrader Store is a secure, scam-free marketplace designed to safeguard both buyers and sellers.

Product types[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/#product-types "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cTrader Store offers a variety of trading products:

[**cBots**](https://ctrader.com/bots)
 – trading robots that can automate any trading strategy, placing orders on your behalf.

[**Indicators**](https://ctrader.com/indicators)
 – visual tools for technical analysis that identify patterns on charts and assist with trading decisions.

[**Plugins**](https://ctrader.com/plugins)
 – add-ons that extend the cTrader desktop interface with helpful tools and features.

[**WebView plugins**](https://ctrader.com/webview-plugins)
 – web-based tools inside mobile, web and desktop cTrader apps that support trading.

cBotsIndicatorsPluginsWebView plugins

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/img/getting-started/cbots-1.PNG)

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/img/getting-started/indicators-1.PNG)

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/img/getting-started/plugins-1.PNG)

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/img/getting-started/webview-plugins-1.PNG)

You can access and manage all your installed products from any cTrader app with [**cloud synchronisation**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/synchronisation/)
.

You can [**run cBots**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/mobile-algo/starting-stopping-deleting-instance/)
 in Cloud 24/7 from any cTrader app. Desktop apps support local execution of cBots, indicators and plugins.

| **Product** | **cTrader Windows** | **cTrader Mac** | **cTrader Web** | **cTrader Mobile** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| cBot | Manage and run  <br>(in Cloud and locally) | Manage and run  <br>(in Cloud and locally) | Manage and run  <br>(in Cloud) | Manage and run  <br>(in Cloud) |
| Indicator | Manage and run | Manage and run | Manage | Manage |
| Plugin | Manage and run | Manage and run | Manage | Manage |
| WebView plugin | Manage and run | Manage and run | Manage and run | Manage and run |

Note

All cTrader apps include [**built-in indicators**](https://help.ctrader.com/knowledge-base/indicators/)
, but custom indicators from Store can only be installed on desktop apps.

Some indicators, plugins and WebView plugins may include trading capabilities.

Learn how to [**use products**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/how-tos/use-a-product/)
 from Store in cTrader.

Free vs paid products[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/#free-vs-paid-products "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cTrader Store offers both free and paid products, giving you flexibility based on your experience level, trading goals and budget.

Free products are a great starting point for algo trading.

*   Ideal for beginners exploring strategies or trying out the interface
*   Good for learning, testing and using on demo accounts
*   No credit card required – start using products instantly

Paid products are designed for result-oriented live trading.

*   Built for professional and performance-focused traders
*   Offer advanced features and strategies for live trading
*   Backed by a money-back period

Note

While free trials are not available, cTrader Store offers a 14-day money-back period for products with technical issues.

Product performance[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/#product-performance "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cBot sellers in cTrader Store can attach backtesting results to showcase the performance of their products.

Warning

Past successful performance does not guarantee future results; all trading products are used at your own risk.

Back to top

---

# Become a seller - cTrader Store

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/how-tos/become-a-seller/#become-a-seller)

Become a seller[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/how-tos/become-a-seller/#become-a-seller "Permanent link")

=====================================================================================================================

After you [**sign in**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/sign-in/)
, tap the **Join as a seller** button.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/img/how-tos/join-as-seller.png)

You must complete the KYC (Know Your Customer) verification to offer paid or free products in [**cTrader Store**](https://ctrader.com/start-selling)
.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/img/how-tos/verify-seller.png)

Note

KYC is handled by our trusted partner [**Sumsub**](https://sumsub.com/)
. cTrader Store does not store or process your documents.

Tip

If you have previously passed KYC with Sumsub, you can use your existing [**Sumsub ID**](https://docs.sumsub.com/docs/sumsub-id)
.

KYC verification[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/how-tos/become-a-seller/#kyc-verification "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You will need to complete the following steps for the KYC process:

1.  Upload a valid government-issued document such as a passport or national ID card. See the full list of [**accepted documents**](https://docs.sumsub.com/docs/qes-supported-identity-documents)
    .
2.  Perform a selfie (liveness) verification using a smartphone camera or a computer webcam. For more details, see Sumsub’s [**selfie verification guide**](https://docs.sumsub.com/docs/liveness)
    .
3.  Provide any of the following as proof of residential address:
    
    *   Utility bill (issued within the last 3 months)
    *   Bank statement
    *   Official letter from a government authority

Note

Upload scanned copies or high-quality photos of the documents.

Verification outcomes[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/how-tos/become-a-seller/#verification-outcomes "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

There are three possible outcomes for your verification:

**Successful** – you are ready to publish your paid and free products in cTrader Store.

**Additional verification required** – your application is subject to additional review, typically regarding address documentation. Our team will contact you within 1-2 business days with guidance on the next steps.

**Rejected** – you can contact our support team at **[support@ctrader.com](mailto:support@ctrader.com)
** for a manual review of your application.

Once your account is verified as a seller, you can start [**publishing products**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/how-tos/publish-a-product/)
.

Warning

Due to banking regulations, citizens of Russia and Belarus can complete KYC verification, but their registered address must be outside these countries.

If you have any questions, please contact **[support@ctrader.com](mailto:support@ctrader.com)
**.

Back to top

---

# Use a product - cTrader Store

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/how-tos/use-a-product/#use-a-product)

Use a product[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/how-tos/use-a-product/#use-a-product "Permanent link")

===============================================================================================================

Once you have selected a free product or purchased a paid one in Store, it is easy to start using it right away in cTrader.

Warning

A product can only be accessed by the user who purchased it or obtained it for free in cTrader Store. A user with a different cTID will not be able to open the product in cTrader.

cBot[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/how-tos/use-a-product/#cbot "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[**cBots**](https://ctrader.com/bots)
 can be started in Cloud from any cTrader app or launched locally from desktop apps.

MobileWebWindows and Mac

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/img/how-tos/mobile-cbot-0.PNG)

1\. Tap **Start cBot** in Store.

2\. Add an instance (account, symbol and period) in cTrader.

3\. Start the cBot in Cloud.

Learn more about [**starting cBots**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/mobile-algo/starting-stopping-deleting-instance/)
.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/img/how-tos/web-cbot-1.PNG)

1\. Click **Start cBot** in Store.

2\. Add an instance (account, symbol and period) in cTrader.

3\. Start the cBot in Cloud.

Learn more about [**starting cBots**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/web-algo/starting-stopping-deleting-instance/)
.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/img/how-tos/web-cbot-1.PNG)

1\. Click the price or **Free** button in Store to install the cBot.

Note

When [**cloud synchronisation**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/synchronisation/managing-synchronisation-settings/)
 is enabled, your purchased cBots become available in cTrader automatically. If cloud synchronisation is disabled, double-click the downloaded algo file to open the cBot in cTrader.

2\. Add an instance (running option, account, symbol and period).

3\. Start the cBot in Cloud or locally.

Learn more about [**installing and starting cBots**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/installing-algos/)
.

Indicator[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/how-tos/use-a-product/#indicator "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Custom [**indicators**](https://ctrader.com/indicators)
 from Store can only be installed on cTrader Windows and Mac.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/img/how-tos/indicators-1.png)

1\. Click the price or **Free** button in Store to install the indicator.

Note

When [**cloud synchronisation**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/synchronisation/managing-synchronisation-settings/)
 is enabled, your purchased indicators become available in cTrader automatically. If cloud synchronisation is disabled, double-click the downloaded algo file to open the indicator in cTrader.

2\. Add an instance (symbol, period and parameters).

3\. Use the indicator for technical analysis.

Learn more about [**using indicators**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-traders/how-to-use-indicators-in-ctrader/)
 in cTrader.

Plugin[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/how-tos/use-a-product/#plugin "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Desktop [**plugins**](https://ctrader.com/plugins)
 from Store can only be installed on cTrader Windows and Mac.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/img/how-tos/plugin-1.png)

1\. Click the price or **Free** button in Store to install the plugin.

Note

When [**cloud synchronisation**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/synchronisation/managing-synchronisation-settings/)
 is enabled, your purchased plugins become available in cTrader automatically. If cloud synchronisation is disabled, double-click the downloaded algo file to open the plugin in cTrader.

2\. Access the plugin in the relevant cTrader UI area.

3\. Use the plugin features.

Learn more about [**using plugins**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/plugins/)
 in cTrader.

WebView plugin[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/how-tos/use-a-product/#webview-plugin "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[**WebView plugins**](https://ctrader.com/webview-plugins)
 can be installed on any cTrader app using the same steps, with no file operations required.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-store/img/how-tos/wv-plugin-1.png)

1.  Tap the price or **Free** button in Store to install the WebView plugin.
2.  [**Access the WebView plugin**](https://help.ctrader.com/webview-plugins/how-tos/access-wv-plugins/)
     in cTrader.
3.  Use the WebView plugin features.

Alternatively, you can [**add a WebView plugin**](https://help.ctrader.com/webview-plugins/how-tos/add-wv-plugins/)
 by accessing Store from within your cTrader app.

Back to top

---

# Commands in plugins - cTrader Algo

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/guides/plugin-commands/#commands-in-plugins)

Commands in plugins[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/guides/plugin-commands/#commands-in-plugins "Permanent link")

===========================================================================================================================

Plugin commands allow cTrader users to add custom elements in the following areas:

*   [**Chart Toolbar**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader/charts/chart-toolbar/)
    
*   [**Active Symbol Panel**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader/interface/active-symbol-panel/)
    
*   [**Charts**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader/charts/open-charts/)
    
*   [**Trade Watch**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader/interface/trade-watch/)
    

Chart toolbar commands[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/guides/plugin-commands/#chart-toolbar-commands "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Action buttons[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/guides/plugin-commands/#action-buttons "Permanent link")

Add action buttons to the Chart Toolbar. When an action button is clicked, the programmed operation is executed.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/plugins/button-with-tooltip-plugin.png)

### Buttons with popup menus[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/guides/plugin-commands/#buttons-with-popup-menus "Permanent link")

Add buttons with a popup menu to the Chart Toolbar. When such a button is clicked, a menu containing a form, text box or action button is displayed.

Sample code:

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27<br>28<br>29<br>30<br>31<br>32<br>33<br>34<br>35<br>36<br>37<br>38<br>39<br>40<br>41<br>42<br>43<br>44<br>45<br>46<br>47<br>48<br>49<br>50<br>51<br>52<br>53<br>54<br>55<br>56<br>57<br>58<br>59<br>60<br>61<br>62<br>63 | `using System; using cAlgo.API; using cAlgo.API.Collections; using cAlgo.API.Indicators; using cAlgo.API.Internals;  namespace cAlgo.Plugins {     [Plugin(AccessRights = AccessRights.None)]     public class CustomToolbarButton : Plugin     {         protected override void OnStart()         {             var icon = new SvgIcon(@"<svg class='w-6 h-6 text-gray-800 dark:text-white' aria-hidden='true' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none' viewBox='0 0 24 24'>     <path stroke='#BFBFBF' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round' stroke-width='2' d='M11 6.5h2M11 18h2m-7-5v-2m12 2v-2M5 8h2a1 1 0 0 0 1-1V5a1 1 0 0 0-1-1H5a1 1 0 0 0-1 1v2a1 1 0 0 0 1 1Zm0 12h2a1 1 0 0 0 1-1v-2a1 1 0 0 0-1-1H5a1 1 0 0 0-1 1v2a1 1 0 0 0 1 1Zm12 0h2a1 1 0 0 0 1-1v-2a1 1 0 0 0-1-1h-2a1 1 0 0 0-1 1v2a1 1 0 0 0 1 1Zm0-12h2a1 1 0 0 0 1-1V5a1 1 0 0 0-1-1h-2a1 1 0 0 0-1 1v2a1 1 0 0 0 1 1Z'/>     </svg>");              var command = Commands.Add(CommandType.ChartContainerToolbar, OpenPositions, icon);             command.ToolTip = "Open Positions";              Commands.Add(CommandType.ChartContainerToolbar, CloseAllPositions, icon);         }          private CommandResult CloseAllPositions (CommandArgs args)         {             var buttonStyle = new Style();              buttonStyle.Set(ControlProperty.Margin, new Thickness(0, 5, 0, 0));             buttonStyle.Set(ControlProperty.Width, 150);              var closePositionsButton = new Button             {                 Text = "Close All Positions",                  Style = buttonStyle               };              closePositionsButton.Click += args =>             {                 foreach (var position in Positions)                 {                     position.Close();                 }             };              var stackPanel = new StackPanel();             stackPanel.AddChild(closePositionsButton);              return new CommandResult(stackPanel);         }          private void OpenPositions(CommandArgs args)          {             ExecuteMarketOrder(TradeType.Buy, "EURUSD", 1000);              ExecuteMarketOrder(TradeType.Buy, "USDJPY", 1000);              ExecuteMarketOrder(TradeType.Buy, "EURGBP", 1000);           }          protected override void OnStop()         {             // Handle Plugin stop here         }     }         }` |

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/plugins/button-with-popup-plugin.png)

To learn how to create plugins that add action buttons and buttons with popup menus to the Chart Toolbar, see this [**guide**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-add-custom-toolbar-buttons-with-plugins/)
.

Active Symbol Panel (ASP) commands[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/guides/plugin-commands/#active-symbol-panel-asp-commands "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Tabs[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/guides/plugin-commands/#tabs "Permanent link")

Add new tabs to display text, numbers, buttons, code, websites or WebView components in Active Symbol Panel.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/plugins/asp-tab.png)

### Blocks[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/guides/plugin-commands/#blocks "Permanent link")

Add new blocks to display text, numbers, buttons, code, websites or WebView components in Active Symbol Panel.

Sample code:

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27<br>28<br>29<br>30<br>31<br>32<br>33<br>34<br>35<br>36<br>37<br>38<br>39<br>40<br>41<br>42<br>43<br>44<br>45<br>46<br>47<br>48<br>49<br>50<br>51<br>52<br>53<br>54<br>55<br>56<br>57<br>58<br>59<br>60<br>61<br>62<br>63<br>64<br>65<br>66<br>67<br>68<br>69<br>70 | `using System; using System.Linq; using cAlgo.API;  namespace cAlgo.Plugins {     [Plugin(AccessRights = AccessRights.None)]     public class MyASPExample : Plugin     {         TextBlock _txtBuyVWAP;         TextBlock _txtSellVWAP;          protected override void OnStart()         {             var block = Asp.SymbolTab.AddBlock("ASP Section Example");             block.Index = 2;             block.Height = 100;             block.IsExpanded = true;              var panel = new StackPanel             {                 Orientation = Orientation.Vertical             };              var textBoxStyle = new Style();              textBoxStyle.Set(ControlProperty.Margin, 5);             textBoxStyle.Set(ControlProperty.FontFamily, "Cambria");             textBoxStyle.Set(ControlProperty.FontSize, 16);             textBoxStyle.Set(ControlProperty.Width, 200);             textBoxStyle.Set(ControlProperty.ForegroundColor, Color.Yellow, ControlState.Hover);              _txtBuyVWAP = new TextBlock             {                 ForegroundColor = Color.Green,                 Text = "Buy Text Box ",                 Style = textBoxStyle             };              _txtSellVWAP = new TextBlock             {                 ForegroundColor = Color.Red,                 Text = "Sell Text Box",                 Style = textBoxStyle             };              panel.AddChild(_txtBuyVWAP);             panel.AddChild(_txtSellVWAP);              block.Child = panel;              var buyPositions = Positions.Where(p => p.TradeType == TradeType.Buy);             _txtBuyVWAP.Text = "Buy Positions VWAF: " + Math.Round((buyPositions.Sum(p => p.EntryPrice * p.VolumeInUnits) /  buyPositions.Sum(p => p.VolumeInUnits)),5);              var sellPositions = Positions.Where(p => p.TradeType == TradeType.Sell);             _txtSellVWAP.Text = "Sell Positions VWAF: " + Math.Round((sellPositions.Sum(p => p.EntryPrice * p.VolumeInUnits) /  sellPositions.Sum(p => p.VolumeInUnits)),5);              Positions.Opened += Positions_Opened;         }           private void Positions_Opened(PositionOpenedEventArgs obj)         {                          var buyPositions = Positions.Where(p => p.TradeType == TradeType.Buy);             _txtBuyVWAP.Text = "Buy Positions VWAP: " + (buyPositions.Sum(p => p.EntryPrice * p.VolumeInUnits) /  buyPositions.Sum(p => p.VolumeInUnits));              var sellPositions = Positions.Where(p => p.TradeType == TradeType.Sell);             _txtSellVWAP.Text = "Sell Positions VWAP: " + (sellPositions.Sum(p => p.EntryPrice * p.VolumeInUnits) /  sellPositions.Sum(p => p.VolumeInUnits));                 }     }   }` |

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/plugins/asp-section.png)

To learn how to create plugins that add websites and VWAP text boxes for open positions, see this [**guide**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-create-plugins-for-asp/)
.

Chart area commands[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/guides/plugin-commands/#chart-area-commands "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Add custom frames to display text, numbers, websites or WebView components as tabs in the charts area.

Sample code:

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27<br>28<br>29<br>30<br>31<br>32<br>33<br>34 | `using System; using cAlgo.API; using cAlgo.API.Collections; using cAlgo.API.Indicators; using cAlgo.API.Internals;  namespace cAlgo.Plugins {     [Plugin(AccessRights = AccessRights.None)]     public class MyCustomFrameExample : Plugin     {          WebView _cTraderWebView = new WebView();          protected override void OnStart()         {             _cTraderWebView.Loaded += _cTraderWebView_Loaded;             var webViewFrame = ChartManager.AddCustomFrame("Forum");             webViewFrame.Child = _cTraderWebView;             webViewFrame.ChartContainer.Mode = ChartMode.Multi;             webViewFrame.Attach();         }          private void _cTraderWebView_Loaded(WebViewLoadedEventArgs args)         {             _cTraderWebView.NavigateAsync("https://ctrader.com/forum");         }          protected override void OnStop()         {             // Handle Plugin stop here         }     }         }` |

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/plugins/ctrader-forum.png)

To learn how to create plugins that add websites and text boxes to the chart area, see this [**guide**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-create-custom-frame-plugins/)
.

Trade Watch commands[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/guides/plugin-commands/#trade-watch-commands "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Add new tabs to display grids, text boxes, websites or WebView components in Trade Watch.

Sample code:

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27<br>28<br>29<br>30<br>31<br>32<br>33<br>34<br>35<br>36<br>37<br>38<br>39<br>40<br>41<br>42<br>43<br>44<br>45<br>46<br>47<br>48<br>49<br>50<br>51<br>52<br>53<br>54<br>55<br>56<br>57<br>58<br>59<br>60<br>61<br>62<br>63<br>64<br>65<br>66<br>67<br>68<br>69<br>70<br>71<br>72<br>73<br>74<br>75<br>76<br>77<br>78<br>79<br>80<br>81<br>82<br>83<br>84<br>85<br>86 | `using System; using cAlgo.API; using cAlgo.API.Collections; using cAlgo.API.Indicators; using cAlgo.API.Internals;  namespace cAlgo.Plugins {     [Plugin(AccessRights = AccessRights.None)]     public class PreviousBarInfo : Plugin     {         TextBlock _lowBlock;         TextBlock _highBlock;         TextBlock _closeBlock;         TextBlock _openBlock;         Bars _bars;          protected override void OnStart()         {             var tradeWatchTab = TradeWatch.AddTab("Previous Bar Info");             tradeWatchTab.IsSelected = true;              var grid = new Grid(2, 2)              {                 HorizontalAlignment = HorizontalAlignment.Center,                 VerticalAlignment = VerticalAlignment.Center,                 ShowGridLines = true,                 Height = 150,                 Width = 150,             };              tradeWatchTab.Child = grid;              _bars = MarketData.GetBars(TimeFrame.Minute, "USDJPY");              _lowBlock = new TextBlock              {                 Text = "Low:" + _bars.LowPrices.LastValue,                 HorizontalAlignment = HorizontalAlignment.Center,                 VerticalAlignment = VerticalAlignment.Center,             };              _highBlock = new TextBlock              {                 Text = "High:" + _bars.HighPrices.LastValue,                 HorizontalAlignment = HorizontalAlignment.Center,                 VerticalAlignment = VerticalAlignment.Center,             };              _closeBlock = new TextBlock              {                 Text = "Close:" +_bars.ClosePrices.LastValue,                 HorizontalAlignment = HorizontalAlignment.Center,                 VerticalAlignment = VerticalAlignment.Center,             };              _openBlock = new TextBlock              {                 Text = "Open:" + _bars.OpenPrices.LastValue,                 HorizontalAlignment = HorizontalAlignment.Center,                 VerticalAlignment = VerticalAlignment.Center,             };              grid.AddChild(_lowBlock, 0, 0);             grid.AddChild(_highBlock, 0, 1);             grid.AddChild(_openBlock, 1, 0);             grid.AddChild(_closeBlock, 1, 1);              _bars.Tick += _bars_Tick;                      }          private void _bars_Tick(BarsTickEventArgs obj)         {             _lowBlock.Text = "Low: " +_bars.LowPrices.LastValue.ToString();             _highBlock.Text = "High: " +_bars.HighPrices.LastValue.ToString();             _openBlock.Text = "Open: " +_bars.HighPrices.LastValue.ToString();             _closeBlock.Text = "Close: " +_bars.HighPrices.LastValue.ToString();         }          protected override void OnStop()         {             // Handle Plugin stop here         }     }         }` |

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/plugins/updated-bars-grid-tw.png)

To learn how to create plugins that add websites and informative grids to Trade Watch, see this [**guide**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-create-plugins-for-tw/)
.

Back to top

---

# Market Sentiment - cTrader Web

 

Market Sentiment
================

The market sentiment is displayed below the QuickTrade buttons

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-web/img/market-sentiment-0.png)

The market sentiment indicates the percentage of client accounts that expect the price to rise or fall respectively.

The information is cross broker and it is collected from all available cTrader servers.

---

Summary[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextBox/#summary "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Represents the text box class.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public class TextBox : Control` |

Namespace[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextBox/#namespace "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cAlgo.API

Examples[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextBox/#examples "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27<br>28<br>29<br>30<br>31<br>32<br>33<br>34<br>35<br>36<br>37<br>38 | `using cAlgo.API;  namespace cAlgo  {      // This sample indicator shows how to add a text box control on your chart      [Indicator(IsOverlay = true, TimeZone = TimeZones.UTC, AccessRights = AccessRights.None)]      public class TextBoxSample : Indicator      {          protected override void Initialize()          {              var stackPanel = new StackPanel              {                  BackgroundColor = Color.Gold,                  HorizontalAlignment = HorizontalAlignment.Center,                  VerticalAlignment = VerticalAlignment.Center,                  Opacity = 0.6,              };              var textBox = new TextBox              {                  Text = "Enter text here...",                  FontWeight = FontWeight.ExtraBold,                  Margin = 5,                  ForegroundColor = Color.White,                  HorizontalAlignment = HorizontalAlignment.Center,                  Width = 150              };              textBox.TextChanged += TextBox_TextChanged;              stackPanel.AddChild(textBox);              Chart.AddControl(stackPanel);          }          private void TextBox_TextChanged(TextChangedEventArgs obj)          {              Print("Text box text changed to: ", obj.TextBox.Text);          }          public override void Calculate(int index)          {          }      }  }` |

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27<br>28<br>29<br>30<br>31<br>32<br>33<br>34<br>35<br>36<br>37<br>38<br>39<br>40<br>41 | `using cAlgo.API;  using cAlgo.API.Internals;  namespace cAlgo  {      // This sample indicator shows how to get a symbol ticks data and handle its tick events      [Indicator(IsOverlay = true, TimeZone = TimeZones.UTC, AccessRights = AccessRights.None)]      public class TickSample : Indicator      {          private Ticks _ticks;          [Parameter("Symbol Name", DefaultValue = "EURUSD")]          public string InputSymbolName { get; set; }          protected override void Initialize()          {              // Getting a symbol ticks data              _ticks = MarketData.GetTicks(InputSymbolName);              // Subscribing to upcoming ticks              _ticks.Tick += Ticks_Tick;              _ticks.HistoryLoaded += Ticks_HistoryLoaded;              // You can also pass a callback method instead of subscribing to HistoryLoaded event              //_ticks.LoadMoreHistoryAsync(Ticks_HistoryLoaded);              _ticks.LoadMoreHistoryAsync();              _ticks.Reloaded += Ticks_Reloaded;          }          private void Ticks_Reloaded(TicksHistoryLoadedEventArgs obj)          {              Print("Ticks got reloaded");          }          private void Ticks_HistoryLoaded(TicksHistoryLoadedEventArgs obj)          {              Print("New ticks loaded: #", obj.Count);          }          private void Ticks_Tick(TicksTickEventArgs obj)          {              // Printing Last tick inside Ticks collection              Print(obj.Ticks.LastTick);          }          public override void Calculate(int index)          {          }      }  }` |

# TextTrimming - cTrader Algo

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextTrimming/#texttrimming)

TextTrimming[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextTrimming/#texttrimming "Permanent link")

=======================================================================================================================

Summary[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextTrimming/#summary "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Describes how text is trimmed when it overflows the edge of its containing box.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public enum TextTrimming` |

Namespace[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextTrimming/#namespace "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cAlgo.API

Examples[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextTrimming/#examples "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27<br>28<br>29<br>30<br>31<br>32<br>33<br>34<br>35 | `using cAlgo.API;  namespace cAlgo  {      // This sample indicator shows how to use TextTrimming property to manage the text trim      [Indicator(IsOverlay = true, TimeZone = TimeZones.UTC, AccessRights = AccessRights.None)]      public class TextTrimmingSample : Indicator      {          [Parameter("Text", DefaultValue = "very long texttttttttttttttttttttt")]          public string Text { get; set; }          [Parameter("Trimming", DefaultValue = TextTrimming.CharacterEllipsis)]          public TextTrimming TextTrimming { get; set; }          protected override void Initialize()          {              var stackPanel = new StackPanel              {                  BackgroundColor = Color.Gold,                  HorizontalAlignment = HorizontalAlignment.Center,                  VerticalAlignment = VerticalAlignment.Center,                  Opacity = 0.6,                  Width = 100              };              stackPanel.AddChild(new TextBlock              {                  Text = Text,                  FontWeight = FontWeight.ExtraBold,                  ForegroundColor = Color.Blue,                  TextTrimming = TextTrimming              });              Chart.AddControl(stackPanel);          }          public override void Calculate(int index)          {          }      }  }` |

Fields[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextTrimming/#fields "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### None[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextTrimming/#none "Permanent link")

**Summary**

Text is not trimmed.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public static TextTrimming None;` |

**Return Value**

TextTrimming

### CharacterEllipsis[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextTrimming/#characterellipsis "Permanent link")

**Summary**

Text is trimmed at a character boundary. An ellipsis (...) is drawn in place of remaining text.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public static TextTrimming CharacterEllipsis;` |

**Return Value**

TextTrimming

### WordEllipsis[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextTrimming/#wordellipsis "Permanent link")

**Summary**

Text is trimmed at a word boundary. An ellipsis (...) is drawn in place of remaining text.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public static TextTrimming WordEllipsis;` |

**Return Value**

TextTrimming

# TextWrapping - cTrader Algo

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextWrapping/#textwrapping)

TextWrapping[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextWrapping/#textwrapping "Permanent link")

=======================================================================================================================

Summary[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextWrapping/#summary "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Specifies whether text wraps when it reaches the edge of the containing box.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public enum TextWrapping` |

Namespace[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextWrapping/#namespace "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cAlgo.API

Examples[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextWrapping/#examples "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27<br>28<br>29<br>30<br>31<br>32<br>33<br>34<br>35 | `using cAlgo.API;  namespace cAlgo  {      // This sample indicator shows how to use TextWrapping property to manage the text wrap      [Indicator(IsOverlay = true, TimeZone = TimeZones.UTC, AccessRights = AccessRights.None)]      public class TextWrappingSample : Indicator      {          [Parameter("Text", DefaultValue = "very long texttttttttttttttttttttt")]          public string Text { get; set; }          [Parameter("Wrapping", DefaultValue = TextWrapping.NoWrap)]          public TextWrapping TextWrapping { get; set; }          protected override void Initialize()          {              var stackPanel = new StackPanel              {                  BackgroundColor = Color.Gold,                  HorizontalAlignment = HorizontalAlignment.Center,                  VerticalAlignment = VerticalAlignment.Center,                  Opacity = 0.6,                  Width = 100              };              stackPanel.AddChild(new TextBlock              {                  Text = Text,                  FontWeight = FontWeight.ExtraBold,                  ForegroundColor = Color.Blue,                  TextWrapping = TextWrapping              });              Chart.AddControl(stackPanel);          }          public override void Calculate(int index)          {          }      }  }` |

Fields[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextWrapping/#fields "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### WrapWithOverflow[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextWrapping/#wrapwithoverflow "Permanent link")

**Summary**

Line-breaking occurs if the line overflows beyond the available block width. However, a line may overflow beyond the block width if the line breaking algorithm cannot determine a line break opportunity, as in the case of a very long word constrained in a fixed-width container with no scrolling allowed.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public static TextWrapping WrapWithOverflow;` |

**Return Value**

TextWrapping

### NoWrap[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextWrapping/#nowrap "Permanent link")

**Summary**

No line wrapping is performed.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public static TextWrapping NoWrap;` |

**Return Value**

TextWrapping

### Wrap[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextWrapping/#wrap "Permanent link")

**Summary**

Line-breaking occurs if the line overflows beyond the available block width, even if the standard line breaking algorithm cannot determine any line break opportunity, as in the case of a very long word constrained in a fixed-width container with no scrolling allowed.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public static TextWrapping Wrap;` |

**Return Value**

TextWrapping

Related Tutorials[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Controls/TextWrapping/#related-tutorials "Permanent link")

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27<br>28<br>29<br>30<br>31<br>32<br>33 | `using cAlgo.API;  namespace cAlgo  {      // This sample shows how to use Thickness for defining a chart control margin      [Indicator(IsOverlay = true, TimeZone = TimeZones.UTC, AccessRights = AccessRights.None)]      public class ThicknessSample : Indicator      {          protected override void Initialize()          {              var stackPanel = new StackPanel              {                  HorizontalAlignment = HorizontalAlignment.Center,                  VerticalAlignment = VerticalAlignment.Center,                  BackgroundColor = Color.Gold,                  Opacity = 0.6              };              var rectangle = new Rectangle              {                  StrokeColor = Color.Blue,                  FillColor = Color.Red,                  StrokeThickness = 2,                  Margin = new Thickness(10, 5, 10, 5),                  Width = 300,                  Height = 100,              };              stackPanel.AddChild(rectangle);              Chart.AddControl(stackPanel);          }          public override void Calculate(int index)          {          }      }  }` |

# Timer - cTrader Algo

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Timer/Timer/#timer)

Timer[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Timer/Timer/#timer "Permanent link")

===============================================================================================

Summary[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Timer/Timer/#summary "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Schedules execution of virtual OnTimer method with specified interval.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public abstract interface Timer` |

Namespace[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Timer/Timer/#namespace "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cAlgo.API

Examples[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Timer/Timer/#examples "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27<br>28<br>29<br>30 | `using cAlgo.API;  using System;  namespace cAlgo.Robots  {      // This sample cBot shows how to use the API Timer, this timer works both on live and back test      // The timer is available for both cBots and indicators      // Every cBot/indicator can have one single timer      // You can also use the .NET timers if you want to but those will not work properly on back test      [Robot(TimeZone = TimeZones.UTC, AccessRights = AccessRights.None)]      public class TimerSample : Robot      {          protected override void OnStart()          {              // You can start the cBot timer by calling Timer.Start method, for interval you can pass a time span or seconds              Timer.Start(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(1));              // You can also use the TimerTick event instead of OnTimer method              Timer.TimerTick += Timer_TimerTick;              // To stop the timer you can call Timer.Stop method anywhere on your cBot/indicator              Timer.Stop();          }          private void Timer_TimerTick()          {              // Put your logic for timer elapsed event here          }          protected override void OnTimer()          {              // Put your logic for timer elapsed event here          }      }  }` |

Methods[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Timer/Timer/#methods "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

void

TimeSpan

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### TimerTick[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Timer/Timer/#timertick "Permanent link")

**Summary**

Occurs when the interval elapses

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public abstract event Action TimerTick;` |

**Examples**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3<br>4<br>5<br>6<br>7<br>8<br>9 | `protected override void OnStart()  {      Timer.TimerTick += OnTimerTick      Timer.Start(1);//start timer with 1 second interval  }  private void OnTimerTick()  {      Chart.DrawStaticText("time", Time.ToString("HH:mm:ss"), VerticalAlignment.Center, HorizontalAlignment.Center, Color.Red);  }` |

# TimeFrame - cTrader Algo

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Period/TimeFrame/#timeframe)

TimeFrame[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Period/TimeFrame/#timeframe "Permanent link")

============================================================================================================

Summary[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Period/TimeFrame/#summary "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Contains supported timeframe values.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public class TimeFrame` |

Namespace[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Period/TimeFrame/#namespace "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cAlgo.API

Examples[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Period/TimeFrame/#examples "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Example 1Example 2

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2 | `if (TimeFrame  < TimeFrame.Daily)      Print("Intraday Trading");` |

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24 | `using cAlgo.API;  namespace cAlgo  {      // This sample indicator shows how to get a time frame from user via parameters and the get that time frame bars      // Also you can use the pre-defined time frames      [Indicator(IsOverlay = true, TimeZone = TimeZones.UTC, AccessRights = AccessRights.None)]      public class TimeFrameSample : Indicator      {          // Getting time frame via a parameter from user          [Parameter("Time Frame", DefaultValue = "Daily")]          public TimeFrame UserSelectedTimeFrame { get; set; }          protected override void Initialize()          {              Print("Name: ", UserSelectedTimeFrame.Name, " \| Short Name: ", UserSelectedTimeFrame.ShortName);              // Getting another time frame bars data, using user selected time frame              var barsBasedOnUserSelectedTimeFrame = MarketData.GetBars(UserSelectedTimeFrame);              // Getting another time frame bars data, using pre-defined TimeFrames              var barsBasedOnOtherTimeFrame = MarketData.GetBars(TimeFrame.Day2);          }          public override void Calculate(int index)          {          }      }  }` |

### Parse[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Period/TimeFrame/#parse "Permanent link")

**Summary**

It parses a string and if it matched to a timeframe name it returns that time frame otherwise it throwsFormatException

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public static TimeFrame Parse(string value)` |

**Parameters**

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| value | string | Timeframe name |

**Return Value**

TimeFrame

### TryParse[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Period/TimeFrame/#tryparse "Permanent link")

**Summary**

It parses a string and if it matched to a timeframe name it sets it to the passed timeFrame parameter

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public static bool TryParse(string value, TimeFrame& timeFrame)` |

**Parameters**

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| value | string | The timeframe name |
| timeFrame | TimeFrame& | The storage variable for the matching timeframe |

**Return Value**

bool

# TotalMarginCalculationType - cTrader Algo

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Account/TotalMarginCalculationType/#totalmargincalculationtype)

TotalMarginCalculationType[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Account/TotalMarginCalculationType/#totalmargincalculationtype "Permanent link")

================================================================================================================================================================

Summary[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Account/TotalMarginCalculationType/#summary "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Defines types of total margin requirements per Symbol.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public enum TotalMarginCalculationType` |

Namespace[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Account/TotalMarginCalculationType/#namespace "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cAlgo.API.Internals

Fields[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Account/TotalMarginCalculationType/#fields "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Sum[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Account/TotalMarginCalculationType/#sum "Permanent link")

**Summary**

Total margin requirements per Symbol are equal to Sum of all margin requirements of all positions of that Symbol.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public static TotalMarginCalculationType Sum;` |

**Return Value**

TotalMarginCalculationType

### Max[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Account/TotalMarginCalculationType/#max "Permanent link")

**Summary**

Total margin requirements per Symbol are equal to Max margin requirements from all Long and all Short Positions of that Symbol.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public static TotalMarginCalculationType Max;` |

**Return Value**

TotalMarginCalculationType

### Net[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Account/TotalMarginCalculationType/#net "Permanent link")

**Summary**

Total margin requirements per Symbol are equal to the difference between margin requirements of all Long and all Short Positions of that Symbol.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public static TotalMarginCalculationType Net;` |

**Return Value**

TotalMarginCalculationType

Back to top

# TimeZones - cTrader Algo

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Utility/TimeZones/#timezones)

TimeZones[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Utility/TimeZones/#timezones "Permanent link")

=============================================================================================================

Summary[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Utility/TimeZones/#summary "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Standard TimeZones class.

Remarks[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Utility/TimeZones/#remarks "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Sets the timezone for all the robot or indicator datetime references.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public static class TimeZones` |

Namespace[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Utility/TimeZones/#namespace "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cAlgo.API

Examples[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Utility/TimeZones/#examples "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Example 1Example 2

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2 | `[Robot(TimeZone = TimeZones.EasternStandardTime)]  public class NewsRobot : Robot` |

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27<br>28<br>29<br>30 | `using cAlgo.API;  using System;  namespace cAlgo  {      // This sample indicator shows how to work with time zones      // Every new cBot/Indicator default time zone is set to UTC via Indicator/Robot attributes TimeZone property      // To change it you can set the attribute time zone property value to any of supported time zones      // For example:      // [Indicator(IsOverlay = true, TimeZone = TimeZones.EasternStandardTime, AccessRights = AccessRights.None)]      // You can also work with different time zones programmatically by using .NET libraries\      [Indicator(IsOverlay = true, TimeZone = TimeZones.UTC, AccessRights = AccessRights.None)]      public class TimeZoneSample : Indicator      {          protected override void Initialize()          {              // You can get user platform time zone offset like this              var platformUserSelectedTimeZoneOffset = Application.UserTimeOffset;              var estTime = GetEasternStandardTime();              Print(estTime.ToString("o"));          }          public override void Calculate(int index)          {          }          private DateTime GetEasternStandardTime()          {              var easternTimeZone = TimeZoneInfo.FindSystemTimeZoneById("Eastern Standard Time");              return TimeZoneInfo.ConvertTimeFromUtc(Server.TimeInUtc, easternTimeZone);          }      }  }` |

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24 | `using cAlgo.API;  using cAlgo.API.Internals;  namespace cAlgo  {      // This sample indicator shows how to use Bars OpenTimes Time Series      [Indicator(IsOverlay = false, TimeZone = TimeZones.UTC, AccessRights = AccessRights.None)]      public class TimeSeriesSample : Indicator      {          protected override void Initialize()          {              // Every Bars object has a time series which is the open times of bars              var timeSeries = Bars.OpenTimes;              Print("Count: ", timeSeries.Count);              // You can get another bars index by using TimeSeries GetIndexByTime/GetIndexByExactTime methods              var dailyBars = MarketData.GetBars(TimeFrame.Daily);              var dailyBarsIndex = timeSeries.GetIndexByTime(dailyBars.OpenTimes.LastValue);              var open = Bars.OpenPrices[dailyBarsIndex];              Print("Daily Bars Index: ", dailyBarsIndex, " \| Open: ", open);          }          public override void Calculate(int index)          {          }      }  }` |

# TickVolume - cTrader Algo

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Indicators/TickVolume/#tickvolume)

TickVolume[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Indicators/TickVolume/#tickvolume "Permanent link")

===================================================================================================================

Summary[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Indicators/TickVolume/#summary "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The Tick Volume indicator shows number of ticks for each bar.

Remarks[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Indicators/TickVolume/#remarks "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Tick Volume is the number of ticks per bar.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public abstract interface TickVolume` |

Namespace[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Indicators/TickVolume/#namespace "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cAlgo.API.Indicators

Examples[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Indicators/TickVolume/#examples "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27<br>28<br>29<br>30<br>31<br>32<br>33<br>34<br>35<br>36<br>37<br>38<br>39<br>40<br>41<br>42<br>43<br>44<br>45<br>46<br>47<br>48<br>49<br>50<br>51<br>52<br>53<br>54<br>55 | `using cAlgo.API;  using cAlgo.API.Indicators;  namespace cAlgo.Robots  {      // This sample cBot shows how to use the Tick Volume indicator      [Robot(TimeZone = TimeZones.UTC, AccessRights = AccessRights.None)]      public class TickVolumeSample : Robot      {          private double _volumeInUnits;          private TickVolume _tickVolume;          [Parameter("Volume (Lots)", DefaultValue = 0.01, Group = "Trade")]          public double VolumeInLots { get; set; }          [Parameter("Stop Loss (Pips)", DefaultValue = 10, Group = "Trade")]          public double StopLossInPips { get; set; }          [Parameter("Take Profit (Pips)", DefaultValue = 10, Group = "Trade")]          public double TakeProfitInPips { get; set; }          [Parameter("Label", DefaultValue = "Sample", Group = "Trade")]          public string Label { get; set; }          public Position[] BotPositions          {              get              {                  return Positions.FindAll(Label);              }          }          protected override void OnStart()          {              _volumeInUnits = Symbol.QuantityToVolumeInUnits(VolumeInLots);              _tickVolume = Indicators.TickVolume();          }          protected override void OnBar()          {              if (Bars.Last(1).ClosePrice > Bars.Last(2).ClosePrice)              {                  ClosePositions(TradeType.Sell);                  if (_tickVolume.Result.Last(1) > _tickVolume.Result.Last(2))                      ExecuteMarketOrder(TradeType.Buy, SymbolName, _volumeInUnits, Label, StopLossInPips, TakeProfitInPips);              }              else if (Bars.Last(1).ClosePrice < Bars.Last(2).ClosePrice)              {                  ClosePositions(TradeType.Buy);                  if (_tickVolume.Result.Last(1) > _tickVolume.Result.Last(2))                      ExecuteMarketOrder(TradeType.Sell, SymbolName, _volumeInUnits, Label, StopLossInPips, TakeProfitInPips);              }          }          private void ClosePositions(TradeType tradeType)          {              foreach (var position in BotPositions)              {                  if (position.TradeType != tradeType) continue;                  ClosePosition(position);              }          }      }  }` |

Properties[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Indicators/TickVolume/#properties "Permanent link")

Indicates the trade direction, whether it is a Buy or a Sell trade.

cAlgo.API

Examples[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Trading/TradeType/#examples "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Example 1Example 2Example 3Example 4

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `ExecuteMarketOrder(TradeType.Buy, Symbol.Name, 20000);` |

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `Position position =  Positions.Find("myLabel", Symbol, TradeType.Sell);` |

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16 | `using cAlgo.API;  namespace cAlgo.Robots  {      // This sample cBot shows how to use the TradeType      // TradeType is used to set an order trade side or direction      [Robot(TimeZone = TimeZones.UTC, AccessRights = AccessRights.None)]      public class TradeTypeSample : Robot      {          [Parameter("Trade Type", DefaultValue = TradeType.Buy)]          public TradeType TradeType { get; set; }          protected override void OnStart()          {              ExecuteMarketOrder(TradeType, SymbolName, Symbol.VolumeInUnitsMin);          }      }  }` |

# TradeOperation - cTrader Algo

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Trading/TradeOperation/#tradeoperation)

TradeOperation[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Trading/TradeOperation/#tradeoperation "Permanent link")

============================================================================================================================

Summary[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Trading/TradeOperation/#summary "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Provides access to the properties describing an asynchronous trade operation.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public sealed class TradeOperation` |

Namespace[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Trading/TradeOperation/#namespace "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cAlgo.API

Examples[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Trading/TradeOperation/#examples "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Example 1Example 2Example 3

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10 | `TradeOperation operation = ExecuteMarketOrderAsync(TradeType.Buy, Symbol.Name, 10000, "asynchronous");  if (operation.IsExecuting)  {      Print("Trade is executing");  }  else  {      if (operation.TradeResult.IsSuccessful)          Print("Trade executed");  }` |

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20 | `protected override void OnStart()  {      Positions.Opened += PositionsOnOpened;      TradeOperation operation = ExecuteMarketOrderAsync(TradeType.Buy, Symbol.Name, 10000, "asynchronous");      ExecuteMarketOrder(TradeType.Buy, Symbol.Name, 10000, "synchronous", 10, 10);      if (operation.IsExecuting)      {          Print("Trade is executing");      }      else      {          if (operation.TradeResult.IsSuccessful)              Print("Trade executed");      }  }  private void PositionsOnOpened(PositionOpenedEventArgs args)  {      var pos = args.Position;      Print("Position {0} opened at {1}", pos.Label, pos.EntryPrice);  }` |

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25 | `using cAlgo.API;  namespace cAlgo.Robots  {      // This sample cBot shows how to use TradeOperation to monitor an async order execution/placement operation      [Robot(TimeZone = TimeZones.UTC, AccessRights = AccessRights.None)]      public class TradeOperationSample : Robot      {          protected override void OnStart()          {              var tradeOperation = ExecuteMarketOrderAsync(TradeType.Buy, SymbolName, Symbol.VolumeInUnitsMin, OnTradeResult);              if (tradeOperation.IsExecuting)              {                  Print("Executing");              }              else              {                  Print("Completed");              }          }          private void OnTradeResult(TradeResult obj)          {              Print("Was Trade Operation Successful: ", obj.IsSuccessful);          }      }  }` |

Methods[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Trading/TradeOperation/#methods "Permanent link")

### IsExecuting[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Trading/TradeOperation/#isexecuting "Permanent link")

**Summary**

True if a trade operation is being executed, false if it completed

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public bool IsExecuting {get;}` |

**Return Value**

bool

**Examples**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3<br>4<br>5<br>6 | `TradeOperation operation = ExecuteMarketOrderAsync(TradeType.Buy, Symbol.Name, 20000, "myLabel");  // ...  if (!operation.IsExecuting)  {      Print("Trade executed");  }` |

### TradeResult[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Trading/TradeOperation/#traderesult "Permanent link")

**Summary**

The result of a trade operation

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public TradeResult TradeResult {get;}` |

**Return Value**

TradeResult

**Examples**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3<br>4<br>5<br>6 | `TradeOperation operation = ExecuteMarketOrderAsync(TradeType.Buy, Symbol.Name, 20000, "myLabel");  // ...  if (!operation.IsExecuting && operation.TradeResult.IsSuccessful)  {      Print("Trade {0} executed", operation.TradeResult.Position.Label);  }` |

# TradeResult - cTrader Algo

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Trading/TradeResult/#traderesult)

TradeResult[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Trading/TradeResult/#traderesult "Permanent link")

===================================================================================================================

Summary[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Trading/TradeResult/#summary "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The result of a trade operation.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public sealed class TradeResult` |

Namespace[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Trading/TradeResult/#namespace "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cAlgo.API

Examples[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Trading/TradeResult/#examples "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Example 1Example 2

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3 | `TradeResult result = ExecuteMarketOrder(TradeType.Sell, Symbol.Name, 20000);  if (result.IsSuccessful)      Print("Sell at {0}", result.Position.EntryPrice);` |

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23 | `using cAlgo.API;  namespace cAlgo.Robots  {      // This sample cBot shows how to get a trade operation result      [Robot(TimeZone = TimeZones.UTC, AccessRights = AccessRights.None)]      public class TradeResultSample : Robot      {          protected override void OnStart()          {              var tradeResult = ExecuteMarketOrder(TradeType.Buy, SymbolName, Symbol.VolumeInUnitsMin);              if (tradeResult.IsSuccessful)              {                  Print("Market order execution was successful");                  var position = tradeResult.Position;                  Print("A new position opend with ID ", position.Id);              }              else              {                  Print("Market order execution was not successful");              }          }      }  }` |

Methods[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Trading/TradeResult/#methods "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

string

### IsSuccessful[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Trading/TradeResult/#issuccessful "Permanent link")

| 1   | `public bool IsSuccessful {get;}` |

bool

**Examples**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3 | `TradeResult result = ExecuteMarketOrder(TradeType.Buy, Symbol.Name, 20000);  if (result.IsSuccessful)      Print("Buy at {0}", result.Position.EntryPrice);` |

### Error[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Trading/TradeResult/#error "Permanent link")

**Summary**

The error code of an unsuccessful trade.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public ErrorCode? Error {get;}` |

**Return Value**

ErrorCode?

**Examples**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3<br>4 | `var mySymbol = MarketData.GetSymbol("EURUSD");  TradeResult result = ExecuteMarketOrder(TradeType.Sell, mySymbol, 1);  if(!result.IsSuccessful)      Print("Error: {0}", result.Error);` |

### Position[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Trading/TradeResult/#position "Permanent link")

**Summary**

The resulting position of a trade request.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public Position Position {get;}` |

**Return Value**

Position

**Examples**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3 | `TradeResult result = ExecuteMarketOrder(TradeType.Sell, Symbol.Name, 50000);  if (result.IsSuccessful)      Print("Sell at {0}", result.Position.EntryPrice);` |

### PendingOrder[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Trading/TradeResult/#pendingorder "Permanent link")

**Summary**

The resulting pending order of a trade request.

**Signature**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `public PendingOrder PendingOrder {get;}` |

**Return Value**

PendingOrder

**Examples**

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3<br>4 | `TradeResult result = PlaceLimitOrder(TradeType.Sell, Symbol.Name,                      50000, Symbol.Ask, "myLabel", 10, null, ProtectionType.Relative);  if(result.IsSuccessful)      Print("Order placed. SL: {0}", result.PendingOrder.StopLoss);` |

Examples[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/Application/UserTimeOffsetChangedEventArgs/#examples "Permanent link")

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21 | `using cAlgo.API;  namespace cAlgo  {      // This example shows how to use the UserTimeOffsetChangedEventArgs      // Change your cTrader platform time offset/zone to see the print message      [Indicator(IsOverlay = true, TimeZone = TimeZones.UTC, AccessRights = AccessRights.None)]      public class UserTimeOffsetChangedEventArgsSample : Indicator      {          protected override void Initialize()          {              Application.UserTimeOffsetChanged += Application_UserTimeOffsetChanged;          }          private void Application_UserTimeOffsetChanged(UserTimeOffsetChangedEventArgs obj)          {              Print("User time offset changed to: {0}", obj.UserTimeOffset);          }          public override void Calculate(int index)          {          }      }  }` |
