# Ngôn ngữ - cTrader ID

 

Ngôn ngữ
========

Đặt ngôn ngữ ưa thích của bạn cho trang web cTID, ứng dụng cTrader và thông báo bằng cách sử dụng menu thả xuống ở đầu [**trang web cTID**](https://id.ctrader.com/)
.

Mở menu thả xuống có thể cuộn và chọn một ngôn ngữ mới.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/language-list.png)

cTrader sẽ tự động áp dụng ngôn ngữ đã chọn cho tất cả các ứng dụng sử dụng cTrader ID của bạn. Bạn cũng sẽ bắt đầu nhận được thông báo bằng ngôn ngữ này.

Hiện tại, cTrader hỗ trợ các ngôn ngữ sau:

*   Tiếng Ả Rập
*   Tiếng Séc
*   Tiếng Đức
*   Tiếng Hy Lạp
*   Tiếng Anh
*   Tiếng Tây Ban Nha
*   Tiếng Pháp
*   Tiếng Hungary
*   Tiếng Indonesia
*   Tiếng Ý
*   Tiếng Nhật
*   Tiếng Hàn
*   Tiếng Mã Lai
*   Tiếng Ba Lan
*   Tiếng Bồ Đào Nha
*   Tiếng Nga
*   Tiếng Slovak
*   Tiếng Slovenia
*   Tiếng Serbia
*   Tiếng Thái
*   Tiếng Thổ Nhĩ Kỳ
*   Tiếng Việt
*   Tiếng Trung Giản thể

Trở lại mục lục

---

# Penciptaan cTID oleh broker - cTrader ID

 

Penciptaan cTID oleh broker
===========================

Bergantung pada proses broker anda, cTrader ID mungkin dicipta oleh pentadbir broker.

Dalam situasi ini, anda perlu memberikan alamat e-mel anda kepada broker. Selepas cTID anda dicipta, mesej pengesahan akan dihantar ke alamat e-mel yang sama. Buka mesej tersebut dan klik butang **Sahkan e-mel**.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/confirm-email-email.png)

Setelah broker mencipta akaun dagangan untuk anda, cTrader akan memaklumkan anda melalui e-mel.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/trading-account-created-email.png)

Nota

Akaun dagangan anda dengan broker akan dipautkan secara automatik ke cTID anda. Selepas log masuk ke cTrader dengan cTID anda, anda akan melihat akaun dagangan broker yang berkenaan. Jika anda telah mencipta cTID lain, hubungi broker anda untuk memautkan atau memautkan semula akaun dagangan sedia ada anda kepada cTID baharu anda.

Apabila cTID anda dicipta oleh broker, anda perlu [**menetapkan kata laluan**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/ms/set-ctid-password/)
.

Kembali ke atas

---

# ลบ cTID - cTrader ID

 

[ข้ามไปที่เนื้อหา](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/th/managing-ctid/delete-ctid/#ctid)

ลบ cTID[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/th/managing-ctid/delete-ctid/#ctid "Permanent link")

====================================================================================================

เปิดแท็บ [**ภาพรวม**](https://id.ctrader.com/my/settings/overview)
 หรือ [**ข้อมูลประจำตัว**](https://id.ctrader.com/my/settings/credentials)
 ของเว็บไซต์ cTID และคลิกปุ่ม **ลบบัญชี cTrader ID**

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/delete-ctid-button.png)

คำเตือน

cTID สามารถลบได้ก็ต่อเมื่อไม่มีบัญชีเทรดที่เชื่อมโยงอยู่ เรียนรู้วิธี [**ลบบัญชี**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/th/managing-ctid/trading-accounts/#delete-trading-accounts)
 ในคู่มือเฉพาะของเรา

ขึ้นอยู่กับกระบวนการของโบรกเกอร์ คุณอาจต้องร้องขอให้โบรกเกอร์ลบ cTID ของคุณ

หลังจากนั้น จะมีข้อความยืนยันถูกส่งไปยังอีเมลที่เชื่อมโยงกับ cTID ของคุณ เปิดข้อความและคลิก **ยืนยัน** cTID ของคุณจะถูกลบ

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/delete-ctid-confirmation-email.png)

คุณจะได้รับอีเมลอีกฉบับเพื่อยืนยันการลบ cTID สำเร็จ

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/delete-ctid-deleted.png)

กลับไปด้านบนสุด

---

# Padam cTID - cTrader ID

 

[Langkau tajuk talian](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/ms/managing-ctid/delete-ctid/#padam-ctid)

Padam cTID[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/ms/managing-ctid/delete-ctid/#padam-ctid "Permanent link")

=============================================================================================================

Buka tab [**Gambaran Keseluruhan**](https://id.ctrader.com/my/settings/overview)
 atau [**Kelayakan**](https://id.ctrader.com/my/settings/credentials)
 di laman web cTID dan klik butang **Padamkan akaun cTrader ID**.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/delete-ctid-button.png)

Amaran

cTID hanya boleh dipadam jika tiada akaun dagangan yang dipautkan kepada cTID tersebut. Ketahui cara untuk [**memadamkan akaun**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/ms/managing-ctid/trading-accounts/#delete-trading-accounts)
 dalam panduan khusus kami.

Bergantung pada proses broker anda, anda mungkin perlu meminta broker anda untuk memadamkan cTID anda.

Selepas itu, mesej pengesahan akan dihantar ke e-mel yang dipautkan kepada cTID anda. Buka mesej tersebut dan klik **Sahkan**. cTID anda kemudiannya akan dipadamkan.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/delete-ctid-confirmation-email.png)

Anda akan menerima satu lagi e-mel yang mengesahkan bahawa cTID anda telah berjaya dipadamkan.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/delete-ctid-deleted.png)

Kembali ke atas

---

# Creating and Adding Indicators - cTrader Mac

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-mac/automate/indicators/#creating-and-adding-indicators)

Creating and Adding Indicators[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-mac/automate/indicators/#creating-and-adding-indicators "Permanent link")

=============================================================================================================================================

Read our dedicated cTrader Algo guide on [**how custom indicators operate**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/indicators/)
.

The entire flow of [**creating and implementing a custom indicator**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/creating-an-indicator/)
 is showcased in a comprehensive diagram in another article.

1\. To create a new indicaator, click on the '**New Indicator**' button located above the collapsible algorithms lists.

![Image title](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-mac/img/automate/15.png)

Input the name of your algorithm.

Note

If you want to create an algorithm similar to one of the sample indicators, simply use the '**Duplicate**' functionality in the algorithm actions menu.

2\. Now, you can edit the sample code in the code editor window to the right of the sidebar.

![Image title](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-mac/img/automate/16.png)

Developing custom indicators, you can use our [**code samples**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/indicator-code-samples/)
.

Refer to the ['**References**'](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/references/)
 section of the cTrader Algo guide to learn more about the classes, methods, and properties you can use when coding indicators. In addition, you can always choose to write custom methods as shown in our introduction to [**C# and .NET**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/c-net-basics/)
.

3\. Save your indicators by clicking on the '**Save**' button above the code editor window, in the context menu, or use the Cmd+S hotkey.

![Image title](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-mac/img/automate/07.png)

Click on the '**Build**' button above the code editor window, to the right of your algorithm, or in the algorithm actions menu. Alternatively, you can use the Cmd+B hotkey.

![Image title](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-mac/img/automate/17.png)

You will see the following message in the '**Build Result**' window after your indicator is built successfully.

![Image title](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-mac/img/automate/09.png)

4\. To add an instance in the cTrader Algo application, press the '**+**' icon to the right of the indicator in the algorithm list.

![Image title](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-mac/img/automate/18.png)

You can also add instances via the menu of indicator actions.

![Image title](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-mac/img/automate/19.png)

In the '**Trade**' application, you can add indicators on the active chart via the [**Chart Toolbar**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-mac/trade/charts/)
 functionality or the [**Chart Context Menu**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-mac/trade/charts/)
.

5\. Adjust your indicator parameters (if needed) in the '**Parameters**' section below the trading chart. You can also open and save parameters by clicking on the corresponding buttons in the top right corner of this section.

![Image title](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-mac/img/automate/20.png)

The added indicator will be displayed on the trading chart or in a separate area below it. Additionally, you can open the indicator '**Parameters**' window by right-clicking on any indicator line. In other tabs of the same window, you can customise lines, levels, and additional parameters of this indicators. Click on '**Reset**' if you want to reset the indicator parameters to defaults.

Note

Indicators are displayed on the trading chart or in a separate area below it immediately after adding an instance. Unlike cBots, they do not 'run'. Hence, you can adjust the parameters of an added indicator at any time.

---

# Tạo cTID bởi nhà môi giới - cTrader ID

 

Tạo cTID bởi nhà môi giới
=========================

Tùy thuộc vào quy trình của nhà môi giới, cTrader ID có thể được tạo bởi quản trị viên của nhà môi giới.

Trong trường hợp này, bạn cần cung cấp địa chỉ email của mình cho nhà môi giới. Sau khi cTID của bạn được tạo, một thông báo xác nhận sẽ được gửi đến cùng địa chỉ email đó. Mở thông báo và nhấp vào nút **Xác nhận email**.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/confirm-email-email.png)

Khi nhà môi giới tạo tài khoản giao dịch cho bạn, cTrader sẽ thông báo cho bạn qua email.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/trading-account-created-email.png)

Ghi chú

Các tài khoản giao dịch của bạn với nhà môi giới sẽ tự động được liên kết với cTID của bạn. Sau khi đăng nhập vào cTrader bằng cTID của bạn, bạn sẽ thấy các tài khoản giao dịch của nhà môi giới tương ứng. Nếu bạn đã tạo một cTID khác, hãy liên hệ với nhà môi giới để liên kết hoặc liên kết lại tài khoản giao dịch hiện có của bạn với cTID mới.

Khi nhà môi giới tạo cTID cho bạn, bạn cần [**đặt mật khẩu**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/vi/set-ctid-password/)
.

Trở lại mục lục

---

# Creación del cTID por parte de un bróker - cTrader ID

 

Creación del cTID por parte de un bróker
========================================

Dependiendo del proceso de su bróker, el administrador del bróker podría crear un cTrader ID.

En tal caso, debe proporcionar su dirección de correo electrónico al bróker. Después de crear su cTID, se le enviará un mensaje de confirmación a la misma dirección de correo electrónico. Abra el mensaje y haga clic en **Confirmar correo**.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/confirm-email-email.png)

Una vez que el bróker haya creado su cuenta de operaciones, cTrader se lo notificará por correo electrónico.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/trading-account-created-email.png)

Nota

Sus cuentas de operaciones con el bróker se vinculan automáticamente a su cTID. Después de iniciar sesión en cTrader con su cTID, verá las cuentas de operaciones del bróker correspondiente. Si ha creado otro cTID, contacte con su bróker para vincular o revincular las cuentas de operaciones existentes a su nuevo cTID.

Cuando el bróker cree su cTID, deberá [**establecer una contraseña**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/es/set-ctid-password/)
.

Volver al principio

---

# Criar um cTID através de um corretor - cTrader ID

 

Criar um cTID através de um corretor
====================================

Dependendo do processo do seu corretor, um cTrader ID pode ser criado pelo administrador do corretor.

Neste caso, terá de fornecer o seu endereço de e-mail ao corretor. Após a criação do seu cTID, será enviada uma mensagem de confirmação para o mesmo endereço de e-mail. Abra a mensagem e clique no botão **Confirmar e-mail**.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/confirm-email-email.png)

Assim que o corretor criar uma conta de negociação para si, o cTrader irá notificá-lo(a) por e-mail.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/trading-account-created-email.png)

Nota

As suas contas de negociação com o corretor são automaticamente associadas ao seu cTID. Após iniciar sessão no cTrader com o seu cTID, verá as contas de negociação do respetivo corretor. Se tiver criado outro cTID, contacte o seu corretor para associar ou reassociar a(s) sua(s) conta(s) de negociação existente(s) ao seu novo cTID.

Se o seu cTID for criado pelo corretor, terá de [**definir uma palavra-passe**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/pt/set-ctid-password/)
.

Voltar ao topo

---

# Membuat cTID melalui broker - cTrader ID

 

Membuat cTID melalui broker
===========================

Tergantung pada proses broker Anda, cTrader ID dapat dibuat oleh administrator broker.

Dalam hal ini, Anda perlu memberikan alamat email Anda kepada broker. Setelah cTID Anda dibuat, pesan konfirmasi akan dikirim ke alamat email yang sama. Buka pesan tersebut dan klik tombol **Konfirmasi email**.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/confirm-email-email.png)

Setelah broker membuat akun trading untuk Anda, cTrader akan memberi tahu Anda melalui email.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/trading-account-created-email.png)

Catatan

Akun trading Anda dengan broker tersebut akan ditautkan ke cTID Anda secara otomatis. Setelah masuk ke cTrader dengan cTID Anda, Anda akan melihat akun trading broker yang sesuai. Jika Anda telah membuat cTID lain, hubungi broker Anda untuk menghubungkan atau menautkan ulang akun trading yang sudah ada ke cTID baru Anda.

Ketika cTID Anda dibuat oleh broker, Anda perlu [**mengatur kata sandi**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/id/set-ctid-password/)
.

Kembali ke atas

---

# إنشاء cTID عن طريق وسيط - cTrader ID

 

إنشاء cTID عن طريق وسيط
=======================

اعتمادًا على عملية الوسيط الخاص بك، قد يتم إنشاء cTrader ID بواسطة المسؤول لدى الوسيط.

في هذه الحالة، عليك تقديم عنوان بريدك الإلكتروني إلى الوسيط. بعد إنشاء cTID الخاص بك، سيتم إرسال رسالة تأكيد إلى عنوان البريد الإلكتروني نفسه. افتح الرسالة وانقر فوق الزر **تأكيد البريد الإلكتروني**.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/confirm-email-email.png)

بمجرد أن يقوم الوسيط بإنشاء حساب تداول لك، سيقوم cTrader بإعلامك عبر البريد الإلكتروني.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/trading-account-created-email.png)

ملاحظة

حسابات التداول الخاصة بك لدى الوسيط مرتبطة تلقائيًا بحساب cTID الخاص بك. بعد تسجيل الدخول إلى cTrader باستخدام cTID الخاص بك، سترى حسابات التداول الخاصة بالوسيط المعني. إذا كنت قد أنشأت cTID آخر، فاتصل بالوسيط الخاص بك لربط أو إعادة ربط حساب (حسابات) التداول الموجود لديك بحساب cTID الجديد الخاص بك.

عندما يتم إنشاء cTID الخاص بك عن طريق الوسيط، عليك [**تعيين كلمة مرور**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/ar/set-ctid-password/)
.

عد إلى الأعلى

---

# Restablecimiento de contraseña - cTrader ID

 

Restablecimiento de contraseña
==============================

Si ha olvidado la contraseña de su cTID, puede restablecerla. Haga clic en **¿Ha olvidado su contraseña?** en la página de inicio de sesión del [**sitio web de cTID**](https://id.ctrader.com/)
, o siga [**este enlace**](https://id.ctrader.com/reset)
.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/forgot-password-ctid-website.png)

Como alternativa, puede usar la función **¿Ha olvidado su contraseña?** en cualquier aplicación de cTrader.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/forgot-password-desktop.png)

En cualquier caso, se le redirigirá a la pantalla para restablecer su contraseña. Introduzca la dirección de email que utilizó para crear su cTID, marque la casilla de reCAPTCHA y luego haga clic en **Restablecer contraseña**.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/reset-password-ctid.png)

Se enviará una solicitud para restablecer la contraseña de su cTID a su correo electrónico. Haga clic en el botón **Restablecer contraseña** que contiene.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/reset-password-ctid-email.png)

Consejo

Si no localiza el correo electrónico para restablecer la contraseña en su bandeja de entrada, revise su carpeta de spam.

Se le redirigirá para que pueda definir una nueva contraseña. Introduzca una nueva contraseña, repítala y haga clic en **Restablecer contraseña**.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/reset-ctid-password-screen.png)

cTrader le enviará un correo electrónico para confirmar que su contraseña se ha modificado correctamente.

Advertencia

Si intenta restablecer la contraseña de su cTID durante el fin de semana, la operación puede retrasarse debido a operaciones de mantenimiento programadas.

Volver al principio

---

# Pemberitahuan - cTrader ID

 

[Langkau tajuk talian](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/ms/managing-ctid/notifications/#akaun-ctrader-id)

Pemberitahuan
=============

cTrader menggunakan mesej e-mel dan pemberitahuan tolak untuk memaklumkan pedagang tentang peristiwa tertentu dan aktiviti berkaitan akaun.

Untuk memilih peristiwa yang anda ingin terima pemberitahuan, navigasi ke tab [**Pemberitahuan**](https://id.ctrader.com/my/settings/notifications)
 di laman web cTID.

E-melTolak

Dalam tab **E-mel**, anda boleh mengkonfigurasi pemberitahuan yang dihantar sebagai mesej e-mel di bawah kategori berikut:

*   Akaun cTrader ID
*   Akaun dagangan
*   cTrader Copy: penyedia strategi
*   cTrader Copy: pelabur

Dalam tab **Tolak**, anda boleh mengkonfigurasi pemberitahuan yang dihantar sebagai mesej tolak di bawah kategori berikut:

*   Akaun dagangan
*   cTrader Copy: penyedia strategi

Nota

Tetapan di bawah kategori **Akaun dagangan** dan **cTrader Copy: penyedia strategi** boleh digunakan secara terperinci untuk akaun demo tertentu, akaun langsung atau gabungan akaun yang berbeza.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/granular-settings-notifications.png)

Memandangkan beberapa kategori dan tetapan pemberitahuan bertindih antara tab **E-mel** dan **Tolak**, kami menyusun senarai berikut dengan cara berstruktur.

Akaun cTrader ID [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/ms/managing-ctid/notifications/#akaun-ctrader-id "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Log masuk berjaya dengan kelayakan cTrader ID** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel setiap kali kelayakan cTrader ID anda digunakan untuk log masuk ke mana-mana aplikasi cTrader.

Akaun dagangan [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/ms/managing-ctid/notifications/#akaun-dagangan "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Dana yang didepositkan atau dikeluarkan (akaun dagangan)** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel atau tolak apabila terdapat deposit atau pengeluaran.
*   **Dana tidak mencukupi untuk pesanan tertangguh** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel atau tolak apabila akaun anda kekurangan dana yang diperlukan untuk mengisi sesuatu pesanan.
*   **Ambang panggilan margin 1 dicapai** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel atau tolak apabila ambang margin 1 dicapai.
*   **Ambang panggilan margin 2 dicapai** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel atau tolak apabila ambang margin 2 dicapai.
*   **Ambang panggilan margin 3 dicapai** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel atau tolak apabila ambang margin 3 dicapai.
*   **Pesanan diisi: henti rugi** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel atau tolak apabila pesanan henti rugi diisi.
*   **Pesanan diisi: ambilan untung** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel atau tolak apabila pesanan ambilan untung diisi.
*   **Pesanan tertangguh diisi** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel atau tolak apabila pesanan tertangguh diisi.
*   **Pemakluman harga** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel atau tolak untuk pemakluman harga.
*   **Pautan rujukan** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel atau tolak apabila rujukan dipautkan ke akaun anda.
*   **Stop out** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel atau tolak apabila tahap stop out diisi.

cTrader Copy: penyedia strategi [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/ms/managing-ctid/notifications/#ctrader-copy-penyedia-strategi "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Komisen copy-trading diterima** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel apabila komisen dibayar ke akaun anda.
*   **Penyalinan bermula** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel apabila akaun anda mendayakan atau mula membenarkan penyalinan.
*   **Penyalinan berhenti** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel apabila akaun anda menyahdayakan atau berhenti membenarkan penyalinan.
*   **Strategi dipadamkan kerana tidak aktif** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel atau tolak apabila strategi salinan anda dipadamkan kerana tidak aktif.
*   **Pemadaman strategi akan dilakukan kerana tidak aktif** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel atau tolak apabila strategi salinan anda akan dipadamkan kerana tidak aktif.

cTrader Copy: pelabur [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/ms/managing-ctid/notifications/#ctrader-copy-pelabur "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Komisen copy-trading terealisasi** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel apabila komisen direalisasikan.
*   **Henti rugi ekuiti telah dicetuskan** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel apabila henti rugi ekuiti untuk strategi dicetuskan.
*   **Dana didepositkan atau dialih keluar (strategi)** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel apabila dana didepositkan atau dialih keluar daripada akaun copy-trading anda.
*   **Stop out** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel apabila tahap stop out untuk akaun copy-trading anda dicapai.
*   **Strategi dipadamkan oleh penyedia** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel apabila strategi yang anda salin dipadamkan oleh penyedia strategi tersebut.
*   **Strategi disambung semula oleh penyedia** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel apabila strategi yang anda salin disambung semula oleh penyedia strategi tersebut selepas dijeda.
*   **Strategi dihentikan oleh penyedia** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel apabila strategi yang anda salin dihentikan oleh penyedia strategi tersebut.

Berita dan kemas kini cTrader [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/ms/managing-ctid/notifications/#berita-dan-kemas-kini-ctrader "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Langgan berita dan kemas kini cTrader** - dayakan pilihan ini untuk menerima pemberitahuan e-mel atau tolak untuk berita dan kemas kini cTrader.

Kembali ke atas

---

# Idioma - cTrader ID

 

Idioma
======

Configure su idioma preferido para el sitio web de cTID, las aplicaciones de cTrader y las notificaciones mediante el menú desplegable situado en la parte superior del [**sitio web de cTID**](https://id.ctrader.com/)
.

Abra el menú desplegable desplazable y seleccione un nuevo idioma.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/language-list.png)

cTrader activará el idioma seleccionado automáticamente en todas las aplicaciones donde utilice su cTrader ID. También comenzará a enviarle las notificaciones en ese idioma.

Actualmente, cTrader admite los siguientes idiomas:

*   Árabe
*   Checo
*   Alemán
*   Griego
*   Inglés
*   Español
*   Francés
*   Húngaro
*   Indonesio
*   Italiano
*   Japonés
*   Coreano
*   Malayo
*   Polaco
*   Portugués
*   Ruso
*   Eslovaco
*   Esloveno
*   Serbio
*   Tailandés
*   Turco
*   Vietnamita
*   Chino simplificado

Volver al principio

---

# การแจ้งเตือน - cTrader ID

 

[ข้ามไปที่เนื้อหา](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/th/managing-ctid/notifications/#ctrader-id)

การแจ้งเตือน
============

cTrader ใช้ข้อความอีเมลและการแจ้งเตือนแบบพุชเพื่อแจ้งให้นักเทรดทราบเกี่ยวกับเหตุการณ์เฉพาะและกิจกรรมที่เกี่ยวข้องกับบัญชี

หากต้องการเลือกเหตุการณ์ที่คุณต้องการรับการแจ้งเตือน ให้ไปที่แท็บ [**การแจ้งเตือน**](https://id.ctrader.com/my/settings/notifications)
 บนเว็บไซต์ cTID

อีเมลพุช

ในแท็บ **อีเมล** คุณสามารถกำหนดค่าการแจ้งเตือนที่ส่งเป็นข้อความอีเมลภายใต้หมวดหมู่ต่อไปนี้:

*   บัญชี cTrader ID
*   บัญชีเทรด
*   cTrader Copy: ผู้ให้บริการกลยุทธ์
*   cTrader Copy: นักลงทุน

ในแท็บ **พุช** คุณสามารถกำหนดค่าการแจ้งเตือนที่ส่งเป็นข้อความพุชภายใต้หมวดหมู่ต่อไปนี้:

*   บัญชีเทรด
*   cTrader Copy: ผู้ให้บริการกลยุทธ์

หมายเหตุ

การตั้งค่าภายใต้หมวดหมู่ **บัญชีเทรด** และ **cTrader Copy: ผู้ให้บริการกลยุทธ์** สามารถนำไปใช้อย่างละเอียดกับบัญชีทดลอง บัญชีจริง หรือการรวมกันของบัญชีต่าง ๆ ได้

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/granular-settings-notifications.png)

เนื่องจากบางหมวดหมู่และการตั้งค่าการแจ้งเตือนทับซ้อนกันระหว่างแท็บ **อีเมล** และ **พุช** เราจึงกำหนดไว้ด้านล่างในรูปแบบที่มีโครงสร้าง

บัญชี cTrader ID [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/th/managing-ctid/notifications/#ctrader-id "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **การเข้าสู่ระบบด้วยข้อมูลประจำตัว cTrader ID ประสบความสำเร็จ** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลทุกครั้งที่ใช้ข้อมูลประจำตัว cTrader ID ของคุณเพื่อเข้าสู่ระบบแอป cTrader ใด ๆ

บัญชีเทรด [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/th/managing-ctid/notifications/#_1 "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **เงินทุนถูกฝากหรือถูกถอน (บัญชีเทรด)** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลหรือพุชเกี่ยวกับการฝากหรือถอนเงิน
*   **เงินทุนไม่เพียงพอสำหรับคำสั่งที่รอดำเนินการ** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลหรือพุชเมื่อบัญชีของคุณขาดเงินทุนที่จำเป็นในการจับคู่คำสั่ง
*   **ถึงเกณฑ์มาร์จิ้นคอล 1** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลหรือพุชเมื่อถึงเกณฑ์มาร์จิ้นคอล 1
*   **ถึงเกณฑ์มาร์จิ้นคอล 2** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลหรือพุชเมื่อถึงเกณฑ์มาร์จิ้นคอล 2
*   **ถึงเกณฑ์มาร์จิ้นคอล 3** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลหรือพุชเมื่อถึงเกณฑ์มาร์จิ้นคอล 3
*   **คำสั่งจับคู่แล้ว: Stop Loss** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลหรือพุชเมื่อคำสั่ง Stop Loss ถูกจับคู่
*   **คำสั่งจับคู่แล้ว: Take Profit** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลหรือพุชเมื่อคำสั่ง Take Profit ถูกจับคู่
*   **คำสั่งที่รอดำเนินการถูกจับคู่** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลหรือพุชเมื่อคำสั่งที่รอดำเนินการถูกจับคู่
*   **แจ้งเตือนราคา** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลหรือพุชสำหรับการแจ้งเตือนราคา
*   **ลิงก์แนะนำ** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลหรือพุชเมื่อมีลิงก์แนะนำเชื่อมโยงกับบัญชีของคุณ
*   **Stop Out** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลหรือพุชเมื่อถึงระดับ Stop Out

cTrader Copy: ผู้ให้บริการกลยุทธ์ [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/th/managing-ctid/notifications/#ctrader-copy "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **รับค่าคอมมิชชันการก๊อปปี้เทรดแล้ว** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลเมื่อมีการจ่ายค่าคอมมิชชันเข้าบัญชีของคุณ
*   **เริ่มต้นการก๊อปปี้** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลเมื่อบัญชีของคุณเปิดใช้งานหรือเริ่มต้นการก๊อปปี้
*   **หยุดการก๊อปปี้** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลเมื่อบัญชีของคุณปิดใช้งานหรือหยุดการก๊อปปี้
*   **กลยุทธ์ถูกลบแล้วเนื่องจากไม่มีการใช้งาน** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลหรือพุชเมื่อกลยุทธ์การก๊อปปี้ของคุณถูกลบเนื่องจากไม่มีการใช้งาน
*   **กำลังจะมีการลบกลยุทธ์เนื่องจากไม่มีการใช้งาน** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลหรือพุชเมื่อกลยุทธ์การก๊อปปี้ของคุณกำลังจะถูกลบเนื่องจากไม่มีการใช้งาน

cTrader Copy: นักลงทุน [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/th/managing-ctid/notifications/#ctrader-copy_1 "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **รับรู้ค่าคอมมิชชันการก๊อปปี้เทรดแล้ว** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลเมื่อมีการรับรู้ค่าคอมมิชชัน
*   **Stop Loss อิควิตี้ ถูกทริกเกอร์** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลเมื่อ Stop Loss อิควิตี้สำหรับกลยุทธ์ถูกทริกเกอร์
*   **เงินทุนถูกฝากหรือถูกนำออก (กลยุทธ์)** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลเมื่อมีการฝากหรือนำเงินออกจากบัญชีก๊อปปี้เทรดของคุณ
*   **Stop Out** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลเมื่อถึงระดับ Stop Out สำหรับบัญชีก๊อปปี้เทรดของคุณ
*   **กลยุทธ์ถูกลบโดยผู้ให้บริการ** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลเมื่อกลยุทธ์ที่คุณกำลังก๊อปปี้ถูกลบโดยผู้ให้บริการ
*   **กลยุทธ์ถูกดำเนินการต่อโดยผู้ให้บริการ** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลเมื่อกลยุทธ์ที่คุณกำลังก๊อปปี้ถูกดำเนินการต่อโดยผู้ให้บริการหลังจากหยุดชั่วคราว
*   **กลยุทธ์ถูกหยุดโดยผู้ให้บริการ** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลเมื่อกลยุทธ์ที่คุณกำลังก๊อปปี้ถูกหยุดโดยผู้ให้บริการ

ข่าวสารและอัปเดต cTrader [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/th/managing-ctid/notifications/#ctrader "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **สมัครรับข่าวสารและอัปเดต cTrader** - เปิดใช้งานเพื่อรับการแจ้งเตือนทางอีเมลหรือพุชสำหรับข่าวสารและอัปเดต cTrader

กลับไปด้านบนสุด

---

# Sesi - cTrader ID

 

Sesi
====

Untuk melihat semua akaun aktif anda, navigasi ke tab [**Sesi**](https://id.ctrader.com/my/settings/sessions)
 di laman web cTID.

Bahagian ini menyenaraikan semua sesi aktif anda merentasi aplikasi cTrader dan broker.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/sessions-list.png)

Untuk menamatkan sesi, klik butang **Hentikan** untuk sesi tertentu. cTID anda kemudiannya akan dilog keluar daripada aplikasi cTrader yang sepadan.

Untuk menamatkan semua sesi, klik butang **Hentikan semua**. cTID anda akan dilog keluar dari semua tempat yang sedang menggunakan cTID tersebut.

Kembali ke atas

---

# เซสชัน - cTrader ID

 

เซสชัน
======

หากต้องการดูบัญชีที่ใช้งานอยู่ทั้งหมดของคุณ ให้ไปที่แท็บ [**เซสชัน**](https://id.ctrader.com/my/settings/sessions)
 ของเว็บไซต์ cTID

ส่วนนี้จะแสดงรายการเซสชันที่ใช้งานอยู่ทั้งหมดของคุณในแอปพลิเคชัน cTrader และโบรกเกอร์ต่างๆ

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/sessions-list.png)

หากต้องการยุติเซสชัน ให้คลิกปุ่ม **ยุติ** สำหรับเซสชันที่ต้องการ cTID ของคุณจะถูกออกจากระบบจากแอปพลิเคชัน cTrader ที่เกี่ยวข้อง

หากต้องการยุติเซสชันทั้งหมด ให้คลิกปุ่ม **ยุติทั้งหมด** cTID ของคุณจะถูกออกจากระบบทุกที่ที่ใช้งานอยู่

กลับไปด้านบนสุด

---

# How to create custom window plugins - cTrader Algo

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-create-custom-window-plugins/#how-to-create-custom-window-plugins)

How to create custom window plugins[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-create-custom-window-plugins/#how-to-create-custom-window-plugins "Permanent link")

================================================================================================================================================================================================

Plugins allow you to create custom windows containing websites, tools or buttons that execute specific operations when clicked. In this article and its corresponding video, we will show you how to create custom windows containing action buttons using a plugin.

Create a plugin[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-create-custom-window-plugins/#create-a-plugin "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

We will create a custom window with a button that, when clicked, sets a [**take profit**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader/trading/orders/#stop-loss-and-take-profit)
 for all open positions. We will start with the window and button elements.

Select the **Algo** app and go to the **Plugins** tab. Click the **New** button. Ensure the **Blank** template is selected. Enter a name for your plugin, such as "Custom Window Plugin", then click **Create**.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/articles/developers/custom-window-plugins/create-window-plugin.png)

Declare the button and the window.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2 | `private Button _buttonAddTakeProfit; private Window _window;` |

Initialise the button.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3<br>4<br>5<br>6 | `_buttonAddTakeProfit = new Button {     BackgroundColor = Color.SeaGreen,     Height = 50,     Text = "Add Take Profit" };` |

Initialise the window and add the button as a child to it.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3<br>4<br>5<br>6<br>7<br>8<br>9 | `_window = new Window {     Height = 150,     Width = 150,     Padding = new Thickness(5, 10, 10, 5) };  _window.Child = _buttonAddTakeProfit; _window.Show();` |

You can copy the full code below:

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27<br>28<br>29<br>30<br>31<br>32<br>33<br>34<br>35<br>36<br>37<br>38<br>39<br>40<br>41<br>42<br>43<br>44 | `using System; using cAlgo.API; using cAlgo.API.Collections; using cAlgo.API.Indicators; using cAlgo.API.Internals;  namespace cAlgo.Plugins {     [Plugin(AccessRights = AccessRights.None)]     public class CustomWindowPlugin : Plugin      {          private Button _buttonAddTakeProfit;         private Window _window;          protected override void OnStart()         {              _buttonAddTakeProfit = new Button             {                 BackgroundColor = Color.SeaGreen,                 Height = 50,                 Text = "Add Take Profit"             };              _window = new Window             {                 Height = 150,                 Width = 150,                 Padding = new Thickness(5, 10, 10, 5)             };              _window.Child = _buttonAddTakeProfit;             _window.Show();          }          protected override void OnStop()         {             // Handle Plugin stop here         }     }         }` |

Click the **Build** button or use the Ctrl+B hotkeys to build the plugin. A custom window with the **Add Take Profit** button should appear.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/articles/developers/custom-window-plugins/add-take-profit-button.png)

You can move, hide, resize or close the window.

Refine the plugin[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-create-custom-window-plugins/#refine-the-plugin "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

We will refine the plugin by returning to our source code and adding an event that handles the button-click event.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `_buttonAddTakeProfit.Click += _buttonAddTakeProfit_Click;` |

Add the logic for setting a take-profit option to any position that lacks it.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10 | `private void _buttonAddTakeProfit_Click(ButtonClickEventArgs args) {     foreach (var position in Positions)     {         if (position.TakeProfit is null)         {             position.ModifyTakeProfitPips(20);         }     } }` |

You can copy the full code below:

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27<br>28<br>29<br>30<br>31<br>32<br>33<br>34<br>35<br>36<br>37<br>38<br>39<br>40<br>41<br>42<br>43<br>44<br>45<br>46<br>47<br>48<br>49<br>50<br>51<br>52<br>53<br>54 | `using System; using cAlgo.API; using cAlgo.API.Collections; using cAlgo.API.Indicators; using cAlgo.API.Internals;  namespace cAlgo.Plugins {     [Plugin(AccessRights = AccessRights.None)]     public class CustomWindowPlugin : Plugin      {         private Button _buttonAddTakeProfit;         private Window _window;          protected override void OnStart()         {             _buttonAddTakeProfit = new Button             {                 BackgroundColor = Color.SeaGreen,                 Height = 50,                 Text = "Add Take Profit"             };              _buttonAddTakeProfit.Click += _buttonAddTakeProfit_Click;              _window = new Window             {                 Height = 150,                 Width = 150,                 Padding = new Thickness(5, 10, 10, 5)             };              _window.Child = _buttonAddTakeProfit;             _window.Show();         }          private void _buttonAddTakeProfit_Click(ButtonClickEventArgs args)         {             foreach (var position in Positions)             {                 if (position.TakeProfit is null)                 {                     position.ModifyTakeProfitPips(20);                 }             }         }                  protected override void OnStop()         {             // Handle Plugin stop here         }     }         }` |

Build the plugin. Go to the **Trade** app, open some positions if you have none open and use the **Add Take Profit** button to confirm that the button works.

Summary[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-create-custom-window-plugins/#summary "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

We believe this article has taught you how to create custom windows containing buttons for operations and other useful elements.

[Subscribe to our YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCgoyyb_r8sgNrf1nqyMyo5A?sub_confirmation=1)

Back to top

---

# Câu hỏi thường gặp - cTrader ID

 

[Bỏ qua](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/vi/faq/#su-khac-biet-giua-ctid-va-tai-khoan-giao-dich-la-gi)

Câu hỏi thường gặp
==================

### Sự khác biệt giữa cTID và tài khoản giao dịch là gì? [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/vi/faq/#su-khac-biet-giua-ctid-va-tai-khoan-giao-dich-la-gi "Permanent link")

cTID là một bộ thông tin đăng nhập (email/tên người dùng và mật khẩu) được sử dụng để đăng nhập vào tất cả các ứng dụng khách của các nhà môi giới cTrader. Tài khoản giao dịch là một số duy nhất gồm bảy chữ số, chỉ dành riêng cho nhà môi giới mà nó được tạo ra. Tìm hiểu thêm về [**điểm khác biệt khác**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/vi/)
.

### Tôi có thể thay đổi tên người dùng cTID không? [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/vi/faq/#toi-co-the-thay-oi-ten-nguoi-dung-ctid-khong "Permanent link")

Tên người dùng được tự động tạo dựa trên địa chỉ email của bạn khi bạn tạo cTID. Tuy nhiên, bạn có thể thay đổi nó bất kỳ lúc nào, giống như bạn có thể thay đổi email và mật khẩu liên kết với cTID của mình. Tìm hiểu cách thay đổi [**thông tin đăng nhập cTID**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/vi/managing-ctid/credentials/)
.

### Tôi có thể đăng ký cTrader bằng tài khoản mạng xã hội không? [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/vi/faq/#toi-co-the-ang-ky-ctrader-bang-tai-khoan-mang-xa-hoi-khong "Permanent link")

Có, bạn có thể đăng ký bằng tài khoản Google hoặc Apple của mình. Khi đăng ký bằng tài khoản Apple, hãy chọn chia sẻ email được liên kết với Apple ID của bạn; nếu không, bạn có thể gặp sự cố trong việc nhận diện nhà môi giới và truy cập tài khoản thực. Tìm hiểu thêm về [**đăng ký bằng tài khoản mạng xã hội**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/vi/sign-in-with-the-social-accounts/)
.

### Tôi có thể truy cập các ứng dụng cTrader của các nhà môi giới khác nhau bằng cùng một cTID không? [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/vi/faq/#toi-co-the-truy-cap-cac-ung-dung-ctrader-cua-cac-nha-moi-gioi-khac-nhau-bang-cung-mot-ctid-khong "Permanent link")

Nếu bạn đã tạo tài khoản giao dịch với nhiều nhà môi giới cTrader và sử dụng cùng một email (và do đó, cùng một cTID), thông tin đăng nhập cTID của bạn có thể được sử dụng với tất cả các nhà môi giới này. Lưu ý rằng trong mỗi ứng dụng cTrader mang thương hiệu riêng, bạn sẽ chỉ thấy các tài khoản được đăng ký dưới nhà môi giới tương ứng. [**Ứng dụng cTrader đa nhà môi giới**](https://ctrader.com/download/)
 cho phép các nhà giao dịch truy cập tất cả các tài khoản giao dịch mà họ có với tất cả các nhà môi giới cTrader.

### Tôi đã tạo cTID, nhưng tôi chưa nhận được email xác nhận. Tại sao? [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/vi/faq/#toi-a-tao-ctid-nhung-toi-chua-nhan-uoc-email-xac-nhan-tai-sao "Permanent link")

Email xác nhận cTID có thể không đến hộp thư của bạn vì các lý do sau:

*   Email đã bị chuyển vào thư rác mà bạn không biết. Hãy vào thư mục thư rác và tìm email. Đánh dấu email là không phải thư rác và thêm **[noreply@ctrader.com](mailto:noreply@ctrader.com)
    ** vào danh sách liên hệ an toàn của bạn để ngăn các email từ địa chỉ này bị đánh dấu là thư rác trong tương lai.
*   Các sự cố mạng tạm thời có thể đã làm chậm việc gửi email. Nếu sau một thời gian bạn vẫn chưa nhận được email, hãy truy cập [**trang web cTID**](https://id.ctrader.com/my/settings/overview)
    , đăng nhập và nhấp vào nút **Gửi lại email xác nhận**.
*   Nếu các gợi ý trên không giải quyết được vấn đề, vui lòng liên hệ với chúng tôi tại **[support@ctrader.com](mailto:support@ctrader.com)
    **, và đội ngũ của chúng tôi sẽ sẵn lòng điều tra thêm.

### Tôi đã tạo tài khoản trong khu vực khách hàng của nhà môi giới, nhưng tôi chưa nhận được email chào mừng cTrader ID. Tại sao? [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/vi/faq/#toi-a-tao-tai-khoan-trong-khu-vuc-khach-hang-cua-nha-moi-gioi-nhung-toi-chua-nhan-uoc-email-chao-mung-ctrader-id-tai-sao "Permanent link")

Email xác nhận cTID có thể không đến hộp thư của bạn vì các lý do sau:

*   Email đã bị chuyển vào thư rác mà bạn không biết. Hãy vào thư mục thư rác và tìm email. Đánh dấu email là không phải thư rác và thêm **[noreply@ctrader.com](mailto:noreply@ctrader.com)
    ** vào danh sách liên hệ an toàn của bạn để ngăn các email từ địa chỉ này bị đánh dấu là thư rác trong tương lai.
*   Các sự cố mạng tạm thời có thể đã làm chậm việc gửi email. Nếu sau một thời gian bạn vẫn chưa nhận được email, hãy truy cập [**trang web cTID**](https://id.ctrader.com/my/settings/overview)
    , đăng nhập và nhấp vào nút **Gửi lại email xác nhận**.
*   Nếu các gợi ý trên không giải quyết được vấn đề, vui lòng liên hệ với chúng tôi tại **[support@ctrader.com](mailto:support@ctrader.com)
    **, và đội ngũ của chúng tôi sẽ sẵn lòng điều tra thêm.

### Tôi đã tạo tài khoản trong khu vực khách hàng của nhà môi giới, nhưng tôi không thể thấy nó trong cTrader. Tại sao? [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/vi/faq/#toi-a-tao-tai-khoan-trong-khu-vuc-khach-hang-cua-nha-moi-gioi-nhung-toi-khong-the-thay-no-trong-ctrader-tai-sao "Permanent link")

Sau khi bạn tạo tài khoản trong khu vực khách hàng của nhà môi giới, bạn có thể không thấy tài khoản trong cTrader vì các lý do sau:

*   Bạn đang sử dụng sai ứng dụng cTrader. Kiểm tra và xác nhận rằng bạn đang sử dụng [**ứng dụng cTrader đa nhà môi giới**](https://ctrader.com/download/)
     hoặc ứng dụng cTrader mang thương hiệu của nhà môi giới của bạn. Bạn không thể truy cập tài khoản giao dịch của mình với Nhà môi giới 1 từ ứng dụng cTrader mang thương hiệu của Nhà môi giới 2.
*   Bạn đã tạo tài khoản cho một nền tảng khác ngoài cTrader. Chỉ các tài khoản cTrader mới có thể được sử dụng trong các ứng dụng cTrader.
*   Địa chỉ email bạn sử dụng để đăng nhập vào khu vực khách hàng của nhà môi giới khác với địa chỉ email bạn sử dụng để đăng nhập vào cTrader. Khi một tài khoản giao dịch được tạo trong khu vực khách hàng của nhà môi giới, nhà môi giới sẽ liên kết tài khoản này với một cTID cụ thể. Nếu bạn đăng nhập vào cTrader bằng một email mới, tài khoản giao dịch liên kết với email trước đó sẽ không được hiển thị.

### Tôi đã tạo tài khoản trong cTrader, nhưng tôi không thể thấy tài khoản trong khu vực khách hàng của nhà môi giới. Tại sao? [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/vi/faq/#toi-a-tao-tai-khoan-trong-ctrader-nhung-toi-khong-the-thay-tai-khoan-trong-khu-vuc-khach-hang-cua-nha-moi-gioi-tai-sao "Permanent link")

Sau khi bạn tạo tài khoản trong cTrader, bạn có thể không thấy tài khoản trong khu vực khách hàng của nhà môi giới vì các lý do sau:

*   Địa chỉ email bạn sử dụng để đăng nhập vào khu vực khách hàng của nhà môi giới khác với địa chỉ email được sử dụng để tạo tài khoản của bạn trong cTrader. Khu vực khách hàng của nhà môi giới của bạn hiển thị thông tin của một cTID khác.
*   Đã xảy ra sự cố và khu vực khách hàng của nhà môi giới không được thông báo về việc tạo tài khoản của bạn.

Trong cả hai trường hợp, bạn cần liên hệ với nhà môi giới của mình để liên kết tài khoản mới với định danh khu vực khách hàng của bạn.

### Tôi có tài khoản giao dịch với một số nhà môi giới, nhưng không thể xem tất cả chúng trên trang web cTID. Tại sao? [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/vi/faq/#toi-co-tai-khoan-giao-dich-voi-mot-so-nha-moi-gioi-nhung-khong-the-xem-tat-ca-chung-tren-trang-web-ctid-tai-sao "Permanent link")

Có thể bạn đang sử dụng trang web cTID dành riêng cho nhà môi giới, chỉ hiển thị các tài khoản giao dịch được đăng ký với nhà môi giới tương ứng. Truy cập [**trang web cTID đa nhà môi giới**](https://id.ctrader.com/my/settings/accounts)
 để xem tất cả các tài khoản thực và demo của bạn được tạo dưới tất cả các nhà môi giới cTrader.

Trở lại mục lục

---

# Sending/Receiving JSON - Open API

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/sending-receiving-json/#sendingreceiving-json)

Sending/Receiving JSON[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/sending-receiving-json/#sendingreceiving-json "Permanent link")

============================================================================================================================

In this tutorial, we explain how you can send and receive JSON messages.

TCP and WebSocket

When working with JSON, you can use either a TCP connection or a WebSocket connection.

Sending JSON[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/sending-receiving-json/#sending-json "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you choose to use JSON in your integration, you will have to send strings containing valid JSON to the cTrader backend. The JSON objects passed as these strings have to contain the following keys.

| Key | Value Data Type | Definition |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `"clientMsgId"` | string | The unique ID of a message. This ID has to be generated and assigned by on the client side. |
| `"payloadType"` | integer | The integer representing the message message. A full list of valid payload types is included in the [**`ProtoOAPayloadType`**](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/model-messages/#protooapayloadtype)<br>. |
| `"payload"` | JSON object | A nested JSON object containing the actual contents of the message. |

An example of a valid string (representing the [**`ProtoOAApplicationAuthReq`**](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/messages/#protooaapplicationauthreq)
 message) can be found below.

`"{"clientMsgId": "cm_id_2", "payloadType": 2100, "payload": {"clientId": "34Rsd_T098asHkl","clientSecret": "validClientSecret"}}"`

To send correct JSON strings, you will need to create a custom mechanism for serialisation in your chosen programming language.

In the below examples, we define just several approaches to handling serialisation. You can (and should) implement your own depending on your preferred programming language and design pattern(s).

C#Python

Below, we define two base classes and then create a custom representation of the [**`ProtoOAApplicationAuthReq`**](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/messages/#protooaapplicationauthreq)
 message.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27<br>28<br>29<br>30<br>31<br>32<br>33 | `public abstract class OpenAPIMessageBase {     public string ClientMsgId { get; set; }     public abstract int PayloadType { get; } }  public abstract class OpenAPIMessagePayloadBase { }  public class ApplicationAuthReq : OpenAPIMessageBase {     public ApplicationAuthReq() { }     public ApplicationAuthReq(string clientId, string clientSecret)     {         this.Payload = new ApplicationAuthReqPayload(clientId, clientSecret);         this.ClientMsgId = Guid.NewGuid().ToString();     }      public override int PayloadType => 2100;     public ApplicationAuthReqPayload? Payload { get; set; }  }  public class ApplicationAuthReqPayload : OpenAPIMessagePayloadBase {     public ApplicationAuthReqPayload() { }     public ApplicationAuthReqPayload(string clientId, string clientSecret)     {         this.ClientId = clientId;         this.ClientSecret = clientSecret;     }     public string ClientId { get; set; } = string.Empty;     public string ClientSecret { get; set; } = string.Empty; }` |

We create a base class for all Open API messages and, for demonstration purposes, define the class for [**`ProtoOAApplicationAuthReq`**](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/messages/#protooaapplicationauthreq)
.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27<br>28<br>29<br>30<br>31 | `import uuid import json  class OpenAPIMessage:  def payloadType(self):     pass  def payload(self):     pass  def clientMsgId(self):     pass  def asJsonString(self):     pass  class ApplicationAuthReq(OpenAPIMessage):  def __init__(self, clientId, clientSecret, clientMsgId = str(uuid.uuid4())):     self.clientId = clientId     self.clientSecret = client_secret     self.payloadType = 2100     self.clientMsgId = clientMsgId     self.payload = {"clientId": self.clientId, "clientSecret": self.clientSecret}  def asJsonString(self):     return json.dumps({"clientMsgId": self.clientMsgId, "payloadType": self.payloadType, "payload": self.payload})` |

After implementing the required logic, you should be able to send new messages to the cTrader backend by creating new instances of the classes representing these messages and then passing them to your preferred TCP or WebSocket client.

Receiving JSON[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/sending-receiving-json/#receiving-json "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

To receive and process JSON messages, you have to implement a method for deserialising a JSON string into an representation of an Open API message.

To implement this method, you may find it helpful to initialise a map (or a dictionary) where payload types can be keys with the names of classes representing messages acting as values. For exception handling purposes, you may want to verify whether the payload type of the message you have received is a key in this map or dictionary. If such a key exists, you can deserialise the message using any suitable logics.

After implementing such a method, you may use it as a callback that is triggered every time you receive a new message.

C#Python

Note that in the example below `TMessage` is a generic type.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21 | `public static class MessageReceivedCallbacks {     public static Dictionary<int, Type> messages = new Dictionary<int, Type>     {         {2100, typeof(ApplicationAuthReq) },      };      public static TMessage ReadMessage<TMessage>(string jsonString) where TMessage : OpenAPIMessageBase     {         JsonDocument doc = JsonDocument.Parse(jsonString);         int payloadType = doc.RootElement.GetProperty("payloadType").GetInt32();          if (!messages.TryGetValue(payloadType, out var type))             throw new Exception("This payload type is not supported");          var result = JsonSerializer.Deserialize(jsonString, type)  as TMessage;          return result;     } }` |

Downcasting

The `ReadMessage()` method does not actually return a specific message class; you will need to handle downcasting separately when receiving a message.

We add the following method to our `ApplicationAuthReq` class.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3 | `@staticmethod def fromJson(jsonDct):     return ApplicationAuthReq(clientId=jsonDct['payload']['clientId'], clientSecret=jsonDct['payload']['clientSecret'], clientMsgId=jsonDct['clientMsgId'])` |

We then add our `readMessage` callback and retrieve a payload from a dictionary.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3<br>4<br>5<br>6<br>7<br>8<br>9 | `class MessageReceivedCallbacks:  messagesDict = {2100: ApplicationAuthReq}  @staticmethod def readMessage(jsonString):     json_dct = json.loads(jsonString)     payloadType = jsonDct['payloadType']     return MessageReceivedCallbacks.messagesDict[payloadType].fromJson(jsonDct)` |

Downcasting

As Python is duck-typed, there is no need to handle downcasting separately. You can deserialise the JSON string into the required type when receiving it.

---

# How to draw Andrews' Pitchfork - cTrader Algo

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-draw-andrews-pitchfork/#how-to-draw-andrews-pitchfork)

How to draw Andrews' Pitchfork[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-draw-andrews-pitchfork/#how-to-draw-andrews-pitchfork "Permanent link")

===============================================================================================================================================================================

Andrews' pitchfork is a popular technical analysis tool used, sometimes with other indicators, to identify potential support and resistance levels in a trending market. These levels serve as a critical foundation for successful trading strategies, giving traders clarity, structure and confidence in their decisions.

This article and its corresponding video will demonstrate how to create a cBot that draws Andrews' Pitchfork on a chart, and code the pitchfork to automatically update as the chart changes.

Draw Andrews' Pitchfork on a chart[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-draw-andrews-pitchfork/#draw-andrews-pitchfork-on-a-chart "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Andrews' Pitchfork consists of a median line (centerline) and two parallel lines that form a channel. These objects help traders visualise trends, forecast price movements and identify potential entry and exit points for trades.

Andrews' Pitchfork is drawn on a price chart using three key points: a high, a low, and a subsequent high or low point. Price movement within this channel often oscillates between the upper and lower lines, while the median line serves as a reversion point.

We will create a cBot that draws an uptrending Andrews' Pitchfork, which typically requires two lows and a high in between. The reverse is the case for a downtrending Andrews' Pitchfork: two highs and a low in between would be needed.

In cTrader Algo, click the **New** button to create a cBot and input a name for it, then click **Create**.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/articles/developers/draw-andrews-pitchfork/new-cbot-andrews-pitchfork.png)

Andrews's Pitchfork requires six parameters to store the following: indices of the high and two lows, two minimum prices and a high price. Declare the six parameters.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3<br>4<br>5<br>6 | `private int _highIndex; private int _lowIndex1; private int _lowIndex2; private double _max; private double _min1; private double _min2;` |

Detect the two minimum prices and the high price needed for the pitchfork points.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3 | `_max = Bars.HighPrices.Maximum(50); _min1 = Bars.LowPrices.Minimum(50); _min2 = Bars.LowPrices.Minimum(10);` |

cTrader Algo allows you to define the time location through methods providing either the absolute time or the relative bar index. The method used to draw the pitchfork on the chart introduces the relevant overrides. In this case, we chose the relative bar index.

Write the code to detect the indices of the high and low prices.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17 | `for (int i = 0; i <= 50; i++) {     if (Bars.HighPrices.Last(i) == _max)         _highIndex = Bars.Count - i - 1; }  for (int i = 0; i <= 50; i++) {     if (Bars.LowPrices.Last(i) == _min1)         _lowIndex1 = Bars.Count - i - 1; }  for (int i = 0; i <= 10; i++) {     if (Bars.LowPrices.Last(i) == _min2)         _lowIndex2 = Bars.Count - i - 1; }` |

Draw the pitchfork on the chart.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `Chart.DrawAndrewsPitchfork("AndrewsPitchfork", _lowIndex1, _min1, _highIndex, _max, _lowIndex2, _min2, Color.Red);` |

You can copy the full code below:

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27<br>28<br>29<br>30<br>31<br>32<br>33<br>34<br>35<br>36<br>37<br>38<br>39<br>40<br>41<br>42<br>43<br>44<br>45<br>46<br>47<br>48<br>49<br>50<br>51<br>52<br>53<br>54<br>55<br>56<br>57 | `using System; using cAlgo.API; using cAlgo.API.Collections; using cAlgo.API.Indicators; using cAlgo.API.Internals;  namespace cAlgo.Robots {     [Robot(AccessRights = AccessRights.None, AddIndicators = true)]     public class AndrewsPitchfork : Robot     {         private int _highIndex;         private int _lowIndex1;         private int _lowIndex2;         private double _max;         private double _min1;         private double _min2;          protected override void OnStart()         {             _max = Bars.HighPrices.Maximum(50);             _min1 = Bars.LowPrices.Minimum(50);             _min2 = Bars.LowPrices.Minimum(10);              for (int i = 0; i <= 50; i++)             {                 if (Bars.HighPrices.Last(i) == _max)                     _highIndex = Bars.Count - i - 1;             }              for (int i = 0; i <= 50; i++)             {                 if (Bars.LowPrices.Last(i) == _min1)                     _lowIndex1 = Bars.Count - i - 1;             }              for (int i = 0; i <= 10; i++)             {                 if (Bars.LowPrices.Last(i) == _min2)                     _lowIndex2 = Bars.Count - i - 1;             }              Chart.DrawAndrewsPitchfork("AndrewsPitchfork", _lowIndex1, _min1, _highIndex, _max, _lowIndex2, _min2, Color.Red);          }          protected override void OnTick()         {             // Handle price updates here         }          protected override void OnStop()         {             // Handle cBot stop here         }     } }` |

To build the cBot, use the Ctrl+B hotkey or click **Build**.

Add a local instance of the cBot: click **Add instance**, select the **Locally** option, then click **Add instance**.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/articles/developers/draw-andrews-pitchfork/add-instance-andrews-pitchfork.png)

Click the instance and navigate to the **Backtesting** tab. Select a period for the backtesting, enable the **Visual mode** option and then click the play icon.

You should see the **Andrews' Pitchfork** drawn on the chart.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/articles/developers/draw-andrews-pitchfork/andrews-pitchfork-backtesting.png)

Update Andrews' Pitchfork[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-draw-andrews-pitchfork/#update-andrews-pitchfork "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Return to the **Algo** app and code the cBot to update the pitchfork as the chart changes.

Create a new method to draw the pitchfork and move the original logic into that method.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27 | `private void DrawAndrewsPitchfork() {     _max = Bars.HighPrices.Maximum(50);     _min1 = Bars.LowPrices.Minimum(50);     _min2 = Bars.LowPrices.Minimum(10);      for (int i = 0; i <= 50; i++)     {         if (Bars.HighPrices.Last(i) == _max)             _highIndex = Bars.Count - i - 1;     }      for (int i = 0; i <= 50; i++)     {         if (Bars.LowPrices.Last(i) == _min1)             _lowIndex1 = Bars.Count - i - 1;     }      for (int i = 0; i <= 10; i++)     {         if (Bars.LowPrices.Last(i) == _min2)             _lowIndex2 = Bars.Count - i - 1;     }      if (_lowIndex1 < _highIndex && _highIndex < _lowIndex2)         Chart.DrawAndrewsPitchfork("AndrewsPitchfork", _lowIndex1, _min1, _highIndex, _max, _lowIndex2, _min2, Color.Red); }` |

Call the new method in the `OnBar()` method.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3<br>4 | `protected override void OnBar() {     DrawAndrewsPitchfork(); }` |

Since only uptrend setups are needed, write the conditional logic that verifies that minimums and maximums are in the correct order.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2 | `if (_lowIndex1 < _highIndex && _highIndex < _lowIndex2)     Chart.DrawAndrewsPitchfork("AndrewsPitchfork", _lowIndex1, _min1, _highIndex, _max, _lowIndex2, _min2, Color.Red);` |

You can copy the full code below:

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27<br>28<br>29<br>30<br>31<br>32<br>33<br>34<br>35<br>36<br>37<br>38<br>39<br>40<br>41<br>42<br>43<br>44<br>45<br>46<br>47<br>48<br>49<br>50<br>51<br>52<br>53<br>54<br>55<br>56<br>57<br>58<br>59<br>60<br>61<br>62<br>63<br>64 | `using System; using cAlgo.API; using cAlgo.API.Collections; using cAlgo.API.Indicators; using cAlgo.API.Internals;  namespace cAlgo.Robots {     [Robot(AccessRights = AccessRights.None, AddIndicators = true)]     public class AndrewsPitchfork : Robot     {         private int _highIndex;         private int _lowIndex1;         private int _lowIndex2;         private double _max;         private double _min1;         private double _min2;          protected override void OnStart()         {          DrawAndrewsPitchfork();           }          private void DrawAndrewsPitchfork()          {            _max = Bars.HighPrices.Maximum(50);             _min1 = Bars.LowPrices.Minimum(50);             _min2 = Bars.LowPrices.Minimum(10);              for (int i = 0; i <= 50; i++)             {                 if (Bars.HighPrices.Last(i) == _max)                     _highIndex = Bars.Count - i - 1;             }              for (int i = 0; i <= 50; i++)             {                 if (Bars.LowPrices.Last(i) == _min1)                     _lowIndex1 = Bars.Count - i - 1;             }              for (int i = 0; i <= 10; i++)             {                 if (Bars.LowPrices.Last(i) == _min2)                     _lowIndex2 = Bars.Count - i - 1;             }              if (_lowIndex1 < _highIndex && _highIndex < _lowIndex2)                  Chart.DrawAndrewsPitchfork("AndrewsPitchfork", _lowIndex1, _min1, _highIndex, _max, _lowIndex2, _min2, Color.Red);         }          protected override void OnBar()         {             DrawAndrewsPitchfork();          }          protected override void OnStop()         {             // Handle cBot stop here         }     } }` |

Build the cBot again and backtest it.

Increase the speed of the visual mode and click the **play** icon.

This time, you should see how the pitchfork is constantly redrawn as the chart changes.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/articles/developers/draw-andrews-pitchfork/andrews-pitchfork-autoupdate-backtesting.png)

Summary[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-draw-andrews-pitchfork/#summary "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This article has explained how to draw Andrews' Pitchfork on a symbol chart and code the pitchfork to update itself as the chart changes.

[Subscribe to our YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCgoyyb_r8sgNrf1nqyMyo5A?sub_confirmation=1)

Back to top
