# How to reference third-party libraries in cTrader Algo - cTrader Algo

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-reference-third-party-libraries/#how-to-reference-third-party-libraries-in-ctrader-algo)

How to reference third-party libraries in cTrader Algo[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-reference-third-party-libraries/#how-to-reference-third-party-libraries-in-ctrader-algo "Permanent link")

=========================================================================================================================================================================================================================================

Third-party libraries enable users to expand and improve the functionality of their cBots, indicators and plugins. Since cTrader Algo is developed with .NET 6.0, users can add and use third-party libraries built with .NET 6.0 in their algo projects.

In this article and the corresponding video, you will learn how to reference third-party libraries in the cTrader Algo API. Using the Discord.Net library, we will demonstrate how to send messages to a Discord channel.

Add a reference by installing a NuGet package[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-reference-third-party-libraries/#add-a-reference-by-installing-a-nuget-package "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

In our first example, we plan to add a reference in our cBot project by installing a package from the NuGet library. NuGet is the official package manager for the .NET platform used to create, consume and distribute packages or libraries.

Note

If you develop algorithms in Visual Studio, use the method of adding a reference described below. Otherwise, navigate to the [**next section**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-reference-third-party-libraries/#add-a-reference-through-the-ctrader-ui)
 of this article.

In cTrader Algo, create a cBot. Click the **New** button, enter a name such as "Discord Message Example", then click the **Create** button.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/articles/developers/reference-third-party-library/create-new-cbot-discord-message-example.png)

Next, go to the [**NuGet website**](https://www.nuget.org/)
, type **Discord** in the text field and select the Discord.Net library from the results.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/articles/developers/reference-third-party-library/nuget-website-discord.png)

Click the **Package manager** tab and then copy the command there.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/articles/developers/reference-third-party-library/nuget-package-manager-tab.png)

Return to cTrader and click **Edit in Visual Studio**.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/articles/developers/reference-third-party-library/edit-in-visual-studio.png)

Your cBot project should open in the Visual Studio application on your computer.

In Visual Studio, open the **Tools** menu, select **NuGet package manager**, then **Package manager console**.

Paste the command you copied earlier from the NuGet website and run it.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `NuGet\Install-Package Discord.Net -Version 3.16.0` |

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/articles/developers/reference-third-party-library/package-manager-console-finished.png)

Having installed the required package, we can proceed to develop our cBot example.

Start by declaring important parameters, such as the Discord bot token and channel ID.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3<br>4<br>5 | `[Parameter("Discord Bot Token")] public string BotToken { get; set; }  [Parameter("Discord Channel ID")] public string ChannelID { get; set; }` |

Then declare a Discord client object and a message channel object.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2 | `DiscordSocketClient _discordSocketClient; IMessageChannel _channel;` |

In our `OnStart()` method, write a simple code to send a message to our channel when the cBot starts.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10 | `protected override void OnStart() {     _discordSocketClient = new DiscordSocketClient();     _discordSocketClient.LoginAsync(TokenType.Bot, BotToken);     _discordSocketClient.StartAsync();      var channelID = Convert.ToUInt64(ChannelID);     _channel = _discordSocketClient.GetChannelAsync(channelID).Result as IMessageChannel;     _channel.SendMessageAsync("Example cBot Started"); }` |

You can copy the full code below:

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27<br>28<br>29<br>30<br>31<br>32<br>33<br>34<br>35<br>36<br>37<br>38<br>39<br>40<br>41<br>42<br>43<br>44 | `using System; using cAlgo.API; using cAlgo.API.Collections; using cAlgo.API.Indicators; using cAlgo.API.Internals; using Discord.WebSocket; using Discord;  namespace cAlgo.Robots {     [Robot(AccessRights = AccessRights.None, AddIndicators = true)]     public class DiscordMessageExample : Robot     {         [Parameter("Discord Bot Token")]         public string BotToken { get; set; }          [Parameter("Discord Channel ID")]         public string ChannelID { get; set; }          DiscordSocketClient _discordSocketClient;         IMessageChannel _channel;          protected override void OnStart()         {             _discordSocketClient = new DiscordSocketClient();             _discordSocketClient.LoginAsync(TokenType.Bot, BotToken);             _discordSocketClient.StartAsync();              var channelID = Convert.ToUInt64(ChannelID);             _channel = _discordSocketClient.GetChannelAsync(channelID).Result as IMessageChannel;             _channel.SendMessageAsync("Example cBot Started");         }          protected override void OnTick()         {             // Handle price updates here         }          protected override void OnStop()         {             // Handle cBot stop here         }     } }` |

Now, build the cBot.

Return to cTrader. Click **Add instance**, specify your preferred parameters in the window and then click the **Add instance** button.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/articles/developers/reference-third-party-library/add-instance-discord-message-example.png)

Enter your Discord bot token and channel ID.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/articles/developers/reference-third-party-library/parameters-discord-token-channel-id.png)

Start the cBot instance. When the **Access request** window appears, click **Allow** to continue.

The cBot should start running, and you should see a message arrive in the Discord channel.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/articles/developers/reference-third-party-library/discord-message.png)

Add a reference through the cTrader UI[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-reference-third-party-libraries/#add-a-reference-through-the-ctrader-ui "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Some libraries are not available as NuGet packages. If you plan to use such libraries in your cBot project, you have to add their DLL files directly as references.

Here, we will demonstrate how you can reference the same Discord.Net library by adding its DLL files.

Return to Visual Studio and uninstall the Discord.Net library we installed in the previous subsection. Open the NuGet Package Manager Console as you did before and run the following command:

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `NuGet\Uninstall-Package Discord.Net -Version 3.16.0` |

The Discord packages will be removed as references in our Discord Message Example cBot. If the cBot is rebuilt now, the build will end with several error messages due to the missing libraries.

Go back to cTrader and add the required libraries using the **Manage references** functionality at the top.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/articles/developers/reference-third-party-library/manage-references-ctrader.png)

When the **Reference manager** window appears, navigate to **Browse** then click the **Browse** button. Select the DLL file and then perform the same action for all the DLL files you want to reference.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/img/articles/developers/reference-third-party-library/browse-references-discord-in-ctrader.png)

Click **Apply** and build the cBot again.

Now, when you run a cBot instance, the build will be completed without errors, and you should see the message arrive in the Discord channel.

This article has demonstrated how to reference third-party libraries in cTrader Algo using two different methods.

[Subscribe to our YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCgoyyb_r8sgNrf1nqyMyo5A?sub_confirmation=1)

Back to top

---

# App and Account Authentication - Open API

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/account-authentication/#app-and-account-authentication)

App and Account Authentication[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/account-authentication/#app-and-account-authentication "Permanent link")

=============================================================================================================================================

The cTrader Open API authentication process is based on [**the OAuth 2.0 standard**](https://oauth.net/2/)
.

This framework allows third-party applications to attain limited access to a service either on behalf of the resource owner, by orchestrating an approval interaction between the resources owner and the service, or by allowing a third-party application to attain access on its own behalf.

Authentication Flow[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/account-authentication/#authentication-flow "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

As per the OAuth 2.0 standard, account authentication requires both an authorization code and an access token.

Defining Tokens

An **authorization code** is a short-term token that is issued for an individual cTID. Its expiration time is one minute. An **access token** is a long-term token that allows an application to send and receive messages to and from the cTrader backend. After receiving it, an authorization code must be quickly exchanged with an access token; afterward, all messages sent to the cTrader backend have to be signed with the received access token to authenticate your application. The expiration time of an access token is 2,628,000 seconds (approximately 30 days). After it is expired, a new access token can be generated using a **refresh token**. The refresh token does not have an expiration time.

Typically, the process of someone new starting to use your application for the first time looks as follows.

1\. A user with a certain cTID accesses your application wherever it is deployed; the user interacts with an action button or equivalent.

2\. The application uses an embedded browser (or any other suitable means) to redirect the user to a specific URI where they will give the app the necessary permissions.

Gaining Trust

Before redirecting the user to this URI, make sure that the user trusts your app and is aware of the fact that they will need to provide additional permissions.

3\. The user is transferred to a predefined redirect URL. This URL contains the access token as the value of the `code` query parameter.

4\. The user is transferred back to the app either of their own accord or automatically. The app is informed of the value of the `code` parameter.

5\. The app sends a request for exchanging the authorization code with an access token to a specific endpoint.

6\. The app receives a response containing the access token as the value of the `"accessToken"` key.

7\. The app sends the [**`ProtoOAApplicationAuthReq` message**](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/messages/#protooaapplicationauthreq)
 containing the `clientId` and `clientSecret` fields.

8\. The app sends the [**`ProtoOAGetAccountListByAccessTokenReq` message**](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/messages/#protooagetaccountlistbyaccesstokenreq)
 containing the `accessToken` field. The response ([**`ProtoOAGetAccountListByAccessTokenRes`**](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/messages/#protooagetaccountlistbyaccesstokenres)
) contains the repeated `ctidTraderAccountId` field.

9\. After receiving a response, the app sends the [**`ProtoOAAccountAuthReq` message**](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/messages/)
 containing the `ctidTraderAccountId` and `accessToken` fields.

Afterward, the user should be authenticated under the account the `ctidTraderAccountId` of which matches the `ctidTraderAccountId` provided during Step 8.

The below diagram explains how the basic authentication flow works from the perspective of your Open API application.

    graph TB
      A([Redirect the user to a specific URI]) ==> B([Receive the authorization code]);
      B ==> C([Send a request for attaining an access code]);
      C ==> D([Send the ProOAApplicationAuthReq message]);
      D ==> E([Send the ProtoOAAccountAuthReq message]);

In the sub-sections below, we explain the key steps of the authentication flow in detail.

### Adding a Redirect URI[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/account-authentication/#adding-a-redirect-uri "Permanent link")

As shown previously, your app needs to attain an authorization code after a user is sent to a certain redirect URI. This URI will include the authorization code as the value of the `code` query parameter.

To add a new redirect URI, do the following.

1\. Open the '**Applications**' page in the Open API portal.

2\. Click on the '**Edit**' button in the row with the application to which you would like to add a redirect URL.

3\. In the newly appeared screen, scroll down to the '**Redirect URIs**' section.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/img/redirectURLs.png)

4\. Add a redirect URL in an available empty text input field. In case no available fields are shown, click on the '**Add Redirect URI**' button.

5\. Click on the '**Save**' button at the bottom of the page to apply your changes.

Managing Redirect URIs

The very first redirect URI is for the playground service that allows you to test your application before giving regular users access to it. Note that it must never be used for a production application. You can add an unlimited number of redirect URIs if required.

### Attaining the Authorization Code[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/account-authentication/#attaining-the-authorization-code "Permanent link")

To receive an authorization code for a specific cTID, your app will need to send a user to the following URI.

`https://id.ctrader.com/my/settings/openapi/grantingaccess/?client_id={clientId}&redirect_uri={your_redirectURI}&scope={scope}&product=web`

Note

At this stage, the user will need to permit your application/service to access their trading accounts. As a result, it is imperative you provide the user with full understanding of what using your application/service will entail in terms of permissions and data storage/processing.

This URI has the following query parameters.

| **Parameter** | **Required?** | **Definition** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `client_id` | Yes | The unique identifier of your Open API application. |
| `redirect_uri` | Yes | A valid redirect URI specified in the settings of your application. |
| `scope` | Yes | The scope of the permissions that you would like to be given to your application. The following values are accepted.  <br>`accounts`. 'View only' access is given. Your application will be able to access account information and statistics; performing trading operations will be impossible.  <br>`trading`. Full access is given to account information and statistics as well as all permitted trading operations. |
| `product` | No  | If this parameter is specified and set to `web`, the authorization screen lacks the header and footer, which makes it look better on mobile devices. While the parameter is optional, we recommend setting it to `web`. |

To view your `client_id`, go to the '**Applications**' page and click on the '**View**' button in the '**Credentials**' column.

After a user is sent to the URI above (and as long as both parameters are valid), they should see a login/signup screen prompting them to authorize under their cTID. Following that, a user will be shown a dialog where they will be able to permit the application to gain access to one or more accounts linked to their cTID.

When the user clicks on the '**Allow Access**' button, they will be redirected to the `redirect_uri` you had specified originally. As shown in the below example, the authorization code will be added to this URI as a query parameter.

`https://my-redirect-uri.com/?code=123ASDASffdg_as234_GCllkoq14adRB7_tvN`

At this point, your application would need to access and store the value of the `code` parameter. It must be quickly exchanged with an access token before the authorization code expires.

Additional Accounts

If a user creates additional accounts after completing the actions described above, these accounts will not be authorized inside the application. Instead, the user would need to be redirected back to the URL provided above so that they could give the application access to any additional accounts that they have created since last login.

Authentication via Google

If the above URI is opened via WebView and the user chooses Google to sign in, Google will display an '**Access Blocked**' page, preventing the user from proceeding further.

To prevent this, make sure that the `user-agent` signature of the device opening the page looks as follows.

`'user-agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36'`

### Attaining an Access Token[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/account-authentication/#attaining-an-access-token "Permanent link")

To get an access token, perform the following REST API call.

Relative URL

The request URL is relative to `https://openapi.ctrader.com`.

| **Method** | **URL** |
| --- | --- |
| `GET` | `apps/token` |

This request has the below query parameters.

| **Parameter** | **Required?** | **Definition** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `grant_type` | Yes | The type of the token send to this endpoint. The following values are accepted.  <br>`authorization_code`. An authorization code is sent to the endpoint to exchange it with an access token.  <br>`refresh_token`. A refresh token is sent to the endpoint to refresh an existing access token. |
| `code` | No  | The token sent to the endpoint. This parameter is mandatory if `grant_type=authorization_code`. |
| `redirect_uri` | No  | A valid redirect URI specified in the settings of your application. This parameter is mandatory if `grant_type=authorization_code`. |
| `client_id` | Yes | The unique identifier of your Open API application. |
| `client_secret` | Yes | The secret key assigned to your Open API application. |

The request example can be found below.

`curl -X GET 'https://openapi.ctrader.com/apps/token?grant_type=authorization_code&code=0ssdgds98as9_QSF56FVC_22dfdf&redirect_uri=https://spotware.com&client_id=5430012&client_secret=012sds23dlkjQsd' -H 'Accept: application/json' -H 'Content-Type: application/json'`

To view your `client_secret`, return to the '**Applications**' page and press the '**View**' button in the '**Credentials**' column.

Upon a successful request, you should receive a response with the following keys.

| **Key** | **Value Type** | **Definition** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `"accessToken"` | string | The access token that your application will use to authenticate the messages sent to the cTrader Open API. |
| `"tokenType"` | string | The type of the access token (`"bearer"` should be the value of this key as the REST standard is used to make the request). |
| `"expiresIn"` | integer | The number of seconds that must pass before the access token expires (by default, the value of this key equals `2628000`). |
| `"refreshToken"` | string | The refresh token that must be used for renewing the access token once it expires. The refresh token has no expiry time itself. |
| `"errorCode"` | string/null | The error code that describes why a request was unsuccessful. For a successfull request, the value of this key should be `null`. |
| `"description"` | string/null | The descroption of an error that has occured during an unsuccessful request. For a successful request, the value of this key should be `null`. |

For an example of a successful response, see the below snippet.

`{     "accessToken":"mos8Bw3D4EG0fRPd4Eqq0JxaFT4zjd8e4YijNezh_ag",     "tokenType":"bearer",     "expiresIn":2628000,     "refreshToken":"VCuafFhy81AFZjsWkbuEzdOhhRj5YTWz8fWUwHam7KM",     "errorCode":null,     "description":null, }`

### Sending the Required ProtoBuf Messages[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/account-authentication/#sending-the-required-protobuf-messages "Permanent link")

After receiving a valid access code, your application will need to send the `ProtoOAApplicationAuthReq`, `ProtoOAGetAccountListByAccessTokenReq`, and `ProtoOAAccountAuthReq` messages. This can be done as follows.

C#Python

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27<br>28<br>29<br>30<br>31<br>32<br>33<br>34<br>35<br>36<br>37<br>38<br>39<br>40 | `private static RepeatedField<ProtoOACtidTraderAccount> _ctidTraderAccounts;  List<IDisposable> _disposables = new(); _disposables.Add(_client.OfType<ProtoOAGetAccountListByAccessTokenRes>().Subscribe(OnAccountIdReceived));  private static void OnAccountIdReceived(ProtoOAGetAccountListByAccessTokenRes response) {      Console.WriteLine($"\nMessage Received:\n{response}");      _ctidTraderAccounts = response.CtidTraderAccount;      var accountAuthReq = new ProtoOAAccountAuthReq     {         CtidTraderAccountId = (long)_ctidTraderAccounts[0].CtidTraderAccountId,         AccessToken = _token.AccessToken,     };      _client.SendMessage(accountAuthReq);  }  var _client = new OpenClient(host, ApiInfo.Port, TimeSpan.FromSeconds(10), useWebSocket: false); var applicationAuthReq = new ProtoOAApplicationAuthReq {     ClientId = {your_client_id}, // Add your client ID here     ClientSecret = {your_app_secret}, // Add your app secret here }; await _client.SendMessage(applicationAuthReq); await Task.Delay(5000); var getAccountListByAccessToken = new ProtoOAGetAccountListByAccessTokenReq  {     AccessToken = {access_token} // Add your access token here } var accountAuthReq = new ProtoOAAccountAuthReq  {     ctidTraderAccountId = {account_id}, // Add the ctidTraderAccountId of the account you want to authorize here     AccessToken = {access_token} // Add your access token here }; await _client.SendMessage(accountAuthReq);` |

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22<br>23<br>24<br>25<br>26<br>27<br>28<br>29<br>30<br>31<br>32<br>33<br>34<br>35<br>36<br>37<br>38<br>39<br>40<br>41<br>42<br>43<br>44<br>45 | `currentAccountId = None client = Client(EndPoints.PROTOBUF_LIVE_HOST if hostType.lower() == "live" else EndPoints.PROTOBUF_DEMO_HOST, EndPoints.PROTOBUF_PORT, TcpProtocol)  def connected(client): # Callback for client connection     print("\nConnected")     request = ProtoOAApplicationAuthReq()     request.clientId = appClientId     request.clientSecret = appClientSecret     deferred = client.send(request)  def disconnected(client, reason): # Callback for client disconnection     print("\nDisconnected: ", reason)  def onMessageReceived(client, message): # Callback for receiving all messages     global currentAccountId     if message.payloadType in [ProtoOASubscribeSpotsRes().payloadType, ProtoOAAccountLogoutRes().payloadType, ProtoHeartbeatEvent().payloadType]:         return     elif message.payloadType == ProtoOAApplicationAuthRes().payloadType:         print("API Application authorized\n")         if currentAccountId is not None:             sendProtoOAAccountAuthReq()             return         accountListReq = ProtoOAGetAccountListByAccessTokenReq()         accountListReq.accessToken = accessToken         deferred = client.send(accountListReq)     elif message.payloadType == ProtoOAGetAccountListByAccessTokenRes().payloadType:         protoOAGetAccountListByAccessTokenRes = Protobuf.extract(message)         currentAccountId = int(protoOAGetAccountListByAccessTokenRes.ctidTraderAccount[0].ctidTraderAccountId)         accountAuthReq = ProtoOAAccountAuthReq()         accountAuthReq.ctidTraderAccountId = currentAccountId         accountAuthReq.accessToken = accessToken         deferred = client.send(accountAuthReq)     elif message.payloadType == ProtoOAAccountAuthRes().payloadType:         protoOAAccountAuthRes = Protobuf.extract(message)         print(f"Account {protoOAAccountAuthRes.ctidTraderAccountId} has been authorized\n")         print("This acccount will be used for all future requests\n")     else:         print("Message received: \n", Protobuf.extract(message))     reactor.callLater(3, callable=executeUserCommand)  def onError(failure): # Call back for errors     print("Message Error: ", failure)     reactor.callLater(3, callable=executeUserCommand)` |

### Refreshing the Access Token[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/account-authentication/#refreshing-the-access-token "Permanent link")

After an access token expires, you will have to renew it using the `refreshToken` you have gotten earlier. You can perform this action via two different ways.

#### Sending an HTTP Request[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/account-authentication/#sending-an-http-request "Permanent link")

To attain a new access token (and, subsequently, a new refresh token), you can perform the same HTTP request [**covered above**](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/account-authentication/#attaining-an-access-token)
. As shown in the below example, you would have to set the `grant_type` query parameter to `refresh_token`.

`curl -X POST 'https://openapi.ctrader.com/apps/token?grant_type=refresh_token&refresh_token=asdXCVCVAS_218kjashf_asdasd2ASD_223x&client_id=5430012&client_secret=012sds23dlkjQsd' -H 'Accept: application/json' -H 'Content-Type: application/json'`

You will receive a response containing the new values of the `"accessToken"` and `"refreshToken"` keys. You can safely use these new values while the old values of the same keys are automatically invalidated.

#### Sending a Protobuf Message[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/account-authentication/#sending-a-protobuf-message "Permanent link")

Alternatively, you can send the `ProtoOARefreshTokenReq` and receive the `ProtoOARefreshTokenRes` message containing new valid tokens.

C#Python

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16 | `_disposables.Add(_client.OfType<ProtoOARefreshTokenRes>().Subscribe(OnRefreshTokenResponse)); private static void OnRefreshTokenResponse(ProtoOARefreshTokenRes response)  {     _token = new Token      {         AccessToken = response.AccessToken,         RefreshToken = response.RefreshToken,         ExpiresIn = DateTimeOffset.FromUnixTimeMilliseconds(response.ExpiresIn),         TokenType = response.TokenType,     } } var refreshTokenReq = new ProtoOARefreshTokenReq     {         refreshToken = {your_refresh_token}, // Add your refresh token here     }; await _client.SendMessage(applicationAuthReq);` |

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1   | `newToken = auth.refreshToken("refresh_Token")` |

Using the Playground[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/account-authentication/#using-the-playground "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The playground provides a quick means for attaining an access token for your own cTID, allowing you to quickly and easily develop and test your app before distributing it among its target audience.

To access the playground, go to the '**Applications**' page and click on the '**Playground**' button. In the newly appeared window, select the scope of the application and press the '**Get Token**' button.

Afterward, you should see the following page.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/img/playground.png)

You can use the access token and the refresh token for sending messages to the API while authenticated under your own cTID.

---

# Idioma - cTrader ID

 

Idioma
======

Defina o seu idioma preferido para o website do cTID, aplicações cTrader e notificações utilizando o menu pendente na parte superior do [**website do cTID**](https://id.ctrader.com/)
.

Abra o menu pendente deslizável e selecione um novo idioma.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/language-list.png)

O cTrader aplica automaticamente o idioma selecionado em todas as aplicações onde o seu cTrader ID é utilizado. Também começará a receber notificações neste idioma.

Atualmente, o cTrader suporta os seguintes idiomas:

*   Árabe
*   Checo
*   Alemão
*   Grego
*   Inglês
*   Espanhol
*   Francês
*   Húngaro
*   Indonésio
*   Italiano
*   Japonês
*   Coreano
*   Malaio
*   Polaco
*   Português
*   Russo
*   Eslovaco
*   Esloveno
*   Sérvio
*   Tailandês
*   Turco
*   Vietnamita
*   Chinês simplificado

Voltar ao topo

---

# Working with custom windows - cTrader Algo

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/working-with-custom-windows/#working-with-custom-windows-in-ctrader-algo)

Working with custom windows in cTrader Algo[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/working-with-custom-windows/#working-with-custom-windows-in-ctrader-algo "Permanent link")

========================================================================================================================================================================================================

In this article and its corresponding video, we will talk about working with custom windows when creating cTrader algos. We will explain what custom windows are and how they can be used in your cBots and indicators. We will also create an example of using a custom window in a cBot.

Custom window example[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/working-with-custom-windows/#custom-window-example "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

We will now switch to the **Algo** app to see an illustration of how custom windows can be used in your cBots and indicators. We will create a new indicator; in it, we will simply use a ready-made example from the documentation. [**Click here**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/guides/ui/Window/#how-to-create-complex-windows)
 to access it.

Copy and paste the code from the documentation into the code editor window. Then, build the indicator and [**add an instance**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/creating-an-indicator/)
 of it to a chart.

As soon as the indicator is added, we should see a custom window popping up. This window contains a complex form displaying information about the symbol to which chart the indicator is currently attached. This form is a great example of what can be achieved with custom windows.

Custom windows vs. WPF and WinForms

There are a couple of reasons why using custom windows is better than using [**WPF**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/guides/ui/WPF/)
 or [**WinForms**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/guides/ui/WinForms/)
. cTrader custom windows already come with a native style that matches the cTrader look and feel. WinForms and WPF windows require special handling and advanced programming skills since they run on different threads. Such issues are fully avoided when using the cTrader custom windows.

How to create a custom window[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/working-with-custom-windows/#how-to-create-a-custom-window "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

We will now demonstrate how you can create a custom window from scratch. We will create a new indicator and call it "Custom Window Example". In this example, we will add a custom window and then add some custom controls to it. The window itself will be declared in the `Initialize()` method; to show the window, we will call the `window.Show()` method.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11 | `protected override void Initialize() {     var window = new Window     {         Title = "My Window",         WindowStartupLocation = WindowStartupLocation.CenterScreen,         Topmost = true     };      window.Show(); }` |

To see the window, we can build the indicator and add it to a chart.

How to add controls to a window[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/working-with-custom-windows/#how-to-add-controls-to-a-window "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

We will now add custom controls to the window. These controls will take the form of a text box containing some text.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16 | `var window = new Window {     Child = new TextBlock      {         Text = "Hi, This is my Window!",         VerticalAlignment = VerticalAlignment.Center,         HorizontalAlignment = HorizontalAlignment.Center,         FontSize = 20,         FontWeight = FontWeight.UltraBold     },     Title = "My Window",     WindowStartupLocation = WindowStartupLocation.CenterScreen,     Topmost = true };               window.Show();` |

We will rebuild the indicator and add a new instance to see what our custom controls look like.

How to modify window properties[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/working-with-custom-windows/#how-to-modify-window-properties "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18 | `var window = new Window {     Child = new TextBlock      {         Text = "Hi, This is my Window!",         VerticalAlignment = VerticalAlignment.Center,         HorizontalAlignment = HorizontalAlignment.Center,         FontSize = 20,         FontWeight = FontWeight.UltraBold     },     Title = "My Window",     WindowStartupLocation = WindowStartupLocation.CenterScreen,     Topmost = true,     Width = 800,     Height = 800 };               window.Show();` |

We will once again rebuild our indicator and add an instance. Now our window area is a rectangle with a width and height of 800 pixels.

The next change will be to add a range in which the window can be resized. To do so, we will add the `MinHeight`, `MaxHeight`, `MinWidth` and `MaxWidth` parameters.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22 | `var window = new Window {     Child = new TextBlock      {         Text = "Hi, This is my Window!",         VerticalAlignment = VerticalAlignment.Center,         HorizontalAlignment = HorizontalAlignment.Center,         FontSize = 20,         FontWeight = FontWeight.UltraBold     },     Title = "My Window",     WindowStartupLocation = WindowStartupLocation.CenterScreen,     Topmost = true,     Width = 800,     Height = 800,     MinHeight = 600,     MaxHeight = 800,     MinWidth = 600,     MaxWidth = 800 };               window.Show();` |

We will rebuild the indicator and, after an instance is added, we can attempt to try its size. Resizing is only possible within the specified width and height range.

We can also change the background colour of a window and make it non-resizable.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13<br>14<br>15<br>16<br>17<br>18<br>19<br>20<br>21<br>22 | `var window = new Window {     Child = new TextBlock      {         Text = "Hi, This is my Window!",         VerticalAlignment = VerticalAlignment.Center,         HorizontalAlignment = HorizontalAlignment.Center,         FontSize = 20,         FontWeight = FontWeight.UltraBold     },     Title = "My Window",     WindowStartupLocation = WindowStartupLocation.CenterScreen,     Topmost = true,     Width = 800,     Height = 800,     MinHeight = 600,     MaxHeight = 800,     MinWidth = 600,     MaxWidth = 800,     BackgroundColor = Color.Black,     ResizeMode = ResizeMode.NoResize };` |

After we perform the usual actions (rebuilding the indicator and adding an instance), the window should have a new background colour.

Summary[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/working-with-custom-windows/#summary "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cTrader custom windows are flexible and can be customised to a high degree. In addition to the properties mentioned above, you can also change margins and padding, the visibility of custom windows and whether they are active under certain conditions. cTrader custom windows also expose methods to show, hide and close them in addition to several other event handlers.

[Subscribe to our YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCgoyyb_r8sgNrf1nqyMyo5A?sub_confirmation=1)

Back to top

---

# How to add methods to the cTrader API - cTrader Algo

 

[Skip to content](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-add-methods-to-ctrader-api/#how-to-add-methods-to-the-ctrader-api)

How to add methods to the cTrader API[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-add-methods-to-ctrader-api/#how-to-add-methods-to-the-ctrader-api "Permanent link")

==================================================================================================================================================================================================

Extension methods are a crucial tool if you want to add new functionality to the cTrader API. Using relatively simple syntax, you can add new behaviours to any pre-defined API class, such as `Symbol` or `Position`. After you define an extension method, you can call it from any object of the class that you extended.

Use case for extension methods[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-add-methods-to-ctrader-api/#use-case-for-extension-methods "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

First, we will conduct a quick demonstration of why you might want to use extension methods.

Using a cBot, we want to be able to access the size of a given position in lots as this information directly affects our preferred trading strategy. To do so, we can try to initialise a variable of the `Position` class and then try to access its `Lots()` method.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2 | `Position position = Positions.Last(); Print(position.Lots());` |

If we simply type the code as is, we will receive an error suggesting that the `Lots()` accessor does not exist in the API. But what if there was a way to add a new method to an existing API member without affecting any other functionalities?

Assuming this method existed, we could have created a simple cBot that, on every bar, would iterate over a list of all current positions and print their size in lots in the log. We would define the `OnBar()` method as follows.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3<br>4<br>5<br>6 | `protected override void OnBar() {     foreach (var position in Positions) {         Print(position.Lots());     } }` |

Extension methods allow us to add the `Lots()` functionality in just a few lines of code and then reuse it whenever we want on any object of the `Position` class. Below, we explain how you can create one and provide several examples of algos using them.

How extension methods work[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-add-methods-to-ctrader-api/#how-extension-methods-work "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

When working with extension methods, be mindful of the following rules.

*   Extension methods are always static.

To declare a static method, all you have to do is use the `static` keyword. Below, declare the `Lots()` method with an empty body.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3<br>4 | `public static class MyExtensions {     public static double Lots() {}  }` |

*   Extension methods can have any number of arguments but the first argument always has to designate the data type/class for which the method is supposed to be called preceded by the keyword `this`.

We will add an object of the `Position` class as the first and only argument of the `Lots()` method. As a `Position` object also contains information about the symbol for which the position is opened, we do not need any other arguments.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3 | `public static class MyExtensions {     public static double Lots(this Position position) {} }` |

*   Extension methods can contain any logic suitable for the provided arguments.

There is no need to use special syntax when defining the body of an extension method. We can treat it as any other method and, therefore, can define its body as follows.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3<br>4<br>5 | `public static class MyExtensions {     public static double Lots(this Position position) {         return position.VolumeInUnits / position.Symbol.LotSize;     } }` |

*   Extension methods can be called as instance methods or static methods.

There are two possible ways to call our extension method in the code of a cBot.

When using the instance method syntax, we call the method from any suitable object of the `Position` type.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2 | `var position = Positions.Last(); Print(position.Lots());` |

When using the static method syntax, we can call our extension method after fully specifying its corresponding static class.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2 | `var position = Positions.Last(); Print(MyExtensions.Lots(position));` |

It is up to you to determine which method of calling extension methods is the most convenient.

Method signatures

When using instance syntax, avoid cases where your extension methods have the same signatures as any of the built-in API methods (such as `Position.Close()`). In these situations, a built-in method will be called every time you attempt to call an extension method with the matching signature.

IntelliSense

When we attempt to call an extension method, IntelliSense uses a special icon to distinguish it from built-in API members.

To demonstrate our new method in action, we can create a cBot that places three orders on start, each with a different volume. On every bar, the cBot prints the volume of all currently open positions in lots.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br> 2<br> 3<br> 4<br> 5<br> 6<br> 7<br> 8<br> 9<br>10<br>11<br>12<br>13 | `protected override void OnStart() {     ExecuteMarketOrder(TradeType.Buy, SymbolName, 10000);     ExecuteMarketOrder(TradeType.Buy, SymbolName, 100000);     ExecuteMarketOrder(TradeType.Buy, SymbolName, 50000); }  protected override void OnBar() {     foreach (var position in Positions) {         Print(position.Lots());     } }` |

After building and launching our cBot, we should see the correct values being printed in the log.

Use extension methods in cBots[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-add-methods-to-ctrader-api/#use-extension-methods-in-cbots "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

We will now try to create a more complex cBot. On every bar, our algo will go over the list of currently open positions and adjust their stop-loss levels so that they are at break-even. To do so, we will need to create a `BreakEven()` extension method for the `Position` class.

We create a new cBot and rename it. Afterwards, we delete all the code that we do not need and add the `MyExtensions` class.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3 | `public static class MyExtensions {  }` |

Our code for the `BreakEven()` method is relatively simple. We check if a position has a stop loss, whether its gross profit is greater than zero and whether the currently set stop loss is not equal to the position entry price. If all of these conditions are true, we modify the stop loss of the position so that it is equal to the position entry price.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3<br>4<br>5<br>6<br>7 | `public static class MyExtensions {     public static void BreakEven(this Position position) {         if (position.StopLoss is not null && position.GrossProfit > 0 && position.StopLoss != position.EntryPrice) {             position.ModifyStopLossPrice(position.EntryPrice);         }     } }` |

In the cBot itself, we do not need to use any method other than `OnBar()`. On every bar we ask the cBot to perform a simple operation, namely iterate over the `Positions` collection and call the new `BreakEven()` method for each element in it.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3<br>4<br>5<br>6 | `protected override void OnBar()  {     foreach (var position in Positions) {         position.BreakEven();     } }` |

After we build and launch our cBot, we can see it in action. It can be a useful trading assistant, especially when managing many open positions.

Use extension methods in indicators[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-add-methods-to-ctrader-api/#use-extension-methods-in-indicators "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

We will also create a useful indicator that relies on extension methods. The indicator will measure volatility by plotting the percentage by which the price of a symbol has changed on each bar compared to the opening price of that bar.

To do so, we will create a new indicator and rename it. In the code editor window, we will create the `MyExtensions` class to extend the `Bar` class.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3 | `public static class MyExtensions {  }` |

We will also add the `PercentageChange()` method. In the `priceChange` variable, we subtract the close price of a bar from its opening price. The method returns our price change divided by the open price and multiplied by 100.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3<br>4<br>5<br>6<br>7<br>8 | `public static class MyExtensions  {     public static double PercentageChange(this Bar bar)      {         var priceChange = bar.Open - bar.Close;         return priceChange / bar.Open * 100;     } }` |

In the indicator code itself, we have no need for the `Initialize()` method and unnecessary parameters. In the body of the `Calculate()` method, we simply call our new `PercentageChange()` method on every bar.

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| 1<br>2<br>3<br>4<br>5<br>6<br>7<br>8 | `[Output("Main")] public IndicatorDataSeries Result { get; set; }  public override void Calculate(int index) {     Result[index] = Bars[index].PercentageChange(); }` |

Afterwards, we save and build our indicator. After creating an instance of it, we should see the correct percentage changes being plotted. They can be used to determine short and long-term volatility, benefitting all kinds of trading strategies.

Summary[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-algo/articles/for-developers/how-to-add-methods-to-ctrader-api/#summary "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

To conclude, extension methods are a valuable tool if you want to create reausable code that adds new functionalities to the cTrader API. We highly recommend experimenting with extension methods as they can make your algos more efficient and easier to maintain.

[Subscribe to our YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCgoyyb_r8sgNrf1nqyMyo5A?sub_confirmation=1)

Back to top

---

# ดีพลิงก์สำหรับมือถือเท่านั้น - ดีปลิงก์ cTrader

 

[ข้ามไปที่เนื้อหา](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/th/mobile-only-deeplinks/#ctrader)

ดีพลิงก์ cTrader สำหรับมือถือเท่านั้น[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/th/mobile-only-deeplinks/#ctrader "Permanent link")

========================================================================================================================================

ดีพลิงก์ด้านล่างนี้ใช้งานได้เฉพาะเมื่อเข้าถึงบนอุปกรณ์มือถือเท่านั้น

เมนูหลัก [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/th/mobile-only-deeplinks/#_1 "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| ลิงก์ | คำจำกัดความ |
| --- | --- |
| `/price-alerts` | เปิดแท็บ **แจ้งเตือนราคา** |
| `/price-alerts/create/{symbol}` | เปิดหน้าจอ **สร้างการแจ้งเตือน** สำหรับสัญลักษณ์ที่มีชื่อตรงกับ `{symbol}` |
| `/search` | เปิดหน้าจอ **ค้นหาและเพิ่มสัญลักษณ์** |
| `/symbols` | เปิดแท็บ **วอตช์ลิสต์** |
| `/symbols/add` | หาก **ตลาดยอดนิยม** เป็นวอตช์ลิสต์ที่เปิดอยู่ในปัจจุบัน (ซึ่งเป็นค่าเริ่มต้น) จะเปิดป๊อปอัป **โคลนตลาดยอดนิยม**  <br>หากมีวอตช์ลิสต์ที่กำหนดเองเปิดอยู่ จะเปิดหน้าจอ **ค้นหาและเพิ่มสัญลักษณ์** |

Trade Watch [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/th/mobile-only-deeplinks/#trade-watch "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| ลิงก์ | คำจำกัดความ |
| --- | --- |
| `/deal/{dealID}` | เปิดหน้าจอรายละเอียดดีลสำหรับดีลที่มีตัวระบุตรงกับ `{dealID}` |

เงินทุน [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/th/mobile-only-deeplinks/#_2 "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| ลิงก์ | คำจำกัดความ |
| --- | --- |
| `/deposit` | เปิดหน้าจอ **ฝาก** |

กลับไปด้านบนสุด

---

# กรณีการใช้งาน - ดีปลิงก์ cTrader

 

[ข้ามไปที่เนื้อหา](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/th/use-cases/#_1)

กรณีการใช้งาน[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/th/use-cases/#_1 "Permanent link")

===============================================================================================

คู่มือนี้แสดงรายการกรณีการใช้งานทั่วไปสำหรับดีพลิงก์ของ cTrader

วิธีทั่วไปในการแชร์ดีพลิงก์

วิธีทั่วไปในการแชร์ดีพลิงก์ของ cTrader มีดังต่อไปนี้

*   ดีพลิงก์สามารถเพิ่มลงในองค์ประกอบที่คลิกได้ใดๆ ที่คุณใช้เพื่ออำนวยความสะดวกในการเรียกร้องให้ดำเนินการที่กำหนดเอง เช่น ปุ่มในอีเมลหรือหน้าแลนดิ้งเพจ
*   ดีพลิงก์สามารถแชร์โดยตรงบนโซเชียลมีเดียหรือช่องทางแชทของคุณ (เช่น กลุ่ม Telegram)
*   ดีพลิงก์สามารถใช้เป็นไฮเปอร์ลิงก์ในเนื้อหาข้อความใดๆ ที่คุณกำลังเผยแพร่ โดยเฉพาะอย่างยิ่งบทความบล็อกหรือเอกสารการศึกษา

กรณีทางธุรกิจทั่วไปของดีพลิงก์ cTrader มีดังต่อไปนี้

*   **สร้างแรงจูงใจในการเทรด** ผ่านดีพลิงก์ คุณสามารถส่งผู้ใช้ไปยังหน้าจอ **คำสั่งใหม่** ใน cTrader ได้โดยตรง การใช้ดีพลิงก์อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพควรสร้างแรงจูงใจในการส่งคำสั่งใหม่
*   **นำทางนักเทรดไปยังพื้นที่เฉพาะของ cTrader** เมื่อใช้ดีพลิงก์ คุณสามารถนำทางนักเทรดไปยังหน้าจอ **ฝาก** **ถอน** และ **โบนัส** ใน cTrader สำหรับทุกคนที่สื่อสารโดยตรงกับนักเทรด ดีพลิงก์เป็นเครื่องมือที่มีค่าในการส่งเสริมการดำเนินการบางอย่าง
*   **นำนักเทรดไปยังตราสารบางอย่าง** หากคุณต้องการให้นักเทรดมุ่งความสนใจไปที่สัญลักษณ์ที่กำลังจะเกิดความผันผวน (EURUSD หลังจากข่าว US CPI) คุณสามารถแชร์ดีพลิงก์ที่นำไปยังหน้าจอ **ข้อมูลสัญลักษณ์** หรือ **สร้างคำสั่งใหม่** สำหรับสัญลักษณ์ที่เลือก
*   **ให้ความรู้นักเทรด** ดีพลิงก์สามารถนำทางนักเทรดไปยังฟีเจอร์ที่เป็นประโยชน์ของ cTrader โดยเฉพาะอย่างยิ่งหน้าจอ **การป้องกันขั้นสูง** สำหรับโพสิชันที่กำหนด ดังนั้น ดีพลิงก์สามารถใช้เพื่อแจ้งเตือนนักเทรดเกี่ยวกับเครื่องมือต่างๆ ของ cTrader และกระตุ้นการเรียนรู้ด้วยตนเอง
*   **โปรโมทตัวคุณเองหรือนักเทรดมืออาชีพรายอื่น** ดีพลิงก์สามารถนำไปยังกลยุทธ์ cTrader Copy บางอย่างหรือ Investor Access ของผลการเทรดของตนเอง ซึ่งทำให้เป็นเครื่องมือที่สมบูรณ์แบบสำหรับการโปรโมทตัวเองหรือนักเทรดมืออาชีพรายอื่น

ด้านล่างนี้ เราแสดงตัวอย่างหลายๆ แบบของการแชร์ดีพลิงก์เมื่อใช้ช่องทางต่างๆ

สร้างการเรียกร้องให้ดำเนินการที่กำหนดเอง [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/th/use-cases/#_2 "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

เมื่อเพิ่มปุ่มลงในเทมเพลตอีเมลหรือหน้าแลนดิ้งเพจของคุณ คุณสามารถใช้ดีพลิงก์ของ cTrader เพื่อสร้างแรงจูงใจในการดำเนินการบางอย่าง ดูตัวอย่างด้านล่างสำหรับปุ่มที่นำไปยังพื้นที่ต่างๆ ของ cTrader เมื่อคลิก

เปิดกราฟสัญลักษณ์เปิดแท็บโบนัสเปิดบัญชีทดลอง

[เทรด EURUSD](https://app.ctrader.com/symbols/EURUSD/chart)

[ดูโบนัสของคุณ](https://app.ctrader.com/bonus)

[เปิดบัญชีทดลอง](https://app.ctrader.com/accounts/create-demo)

แชร์ผ่านโซเชียลมีเดียและแอปแชท [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/th/use-cases/#_3 "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ดีพลิงก์สามารถแชร์ได้อย่างอิสระบนโซเชียลมีเดียหรือเมื่อใช้แอปแชทต่างๆ เช่น Telegram ภาพหน้าจอด้านล่างแสดงตัวอย่างหลายๆ แบบของสิ่งนี้

จัดการกลยุทธ์ที่ชื่นชอบทำการฝากส่งคำสั่ง Limit

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/img/favorite-streategies-deeplink.png)

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/img/deposit-deeplink.png)

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/img/limit-order-deeplink.png)

ใช้ไฮเปอร์ลิงก์ [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/th/use-cases/#_4 "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ดีพลิงก์ของ cTrader สามารถใช้เป็นไฮเปอร์ลิงก์เมื่อใดก็ตามที่คุณเห็นว่าเหมาะสม โปรดดูแท็บด้านล่างสำหรับตัวอย่างที่ถูกต้องของการฝังดีพลิงก์ในเนื้อหาข้อความ

ส่งคำสั่ง Stopแก้ไขคำสั่งที่รอดำเนินการดูสัญลักษณ์ทั้งหมด

หลังจากเรียนรู้เกี่ยวกับวิธีการทำงานของคำสั่ง Stop คุณสามารถลองส่ง [**คำสั่ง Stop สำหรับ EURUSD**](https://app.ctrader.com/orders/create-stop-order/EURUSD)

โปรดทราบว่าคำสั่งที่รอดำเนินการ [**สามารถแก้ไขได้**](https://app.ctrader.com/orders/modify)
 เพื่อให้สอดคล้องกับกลยุทธ์ของคุณ

เลือกสัญลักษณ์จาก [**สัญลักษณ์ทั้งหมด**](https://app.ctrader.com/finder)
 เพื่อเทรด

# Parameter rentetan pertanyaan - Plugin WebView

 

[Langkau tajuk talian](https://help.ctrader.com/webview-plugins/ms/query-string-parameters/#parameter-rentetan-pertanyaan)

Amaran

Ciri ini dalam fasa prapelancaran dan sedang diuji. Dokumentasi adalah untuk rujukan sahaja.

Parameter rentetan pertanyaan[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/webview-plugins/ms/query-string-parameters/#parameter-rentetan-pertanyaan "Permanent link")

======================================================================================================================================================

Anda boleh menggunakan parameter rentetan pertanyaan untuk menyesuaikan dan mengkonfigurasi tingkah laku kontekstual plugin WebView. Parameter yang anda hantar digunakan setiap kali pengguna melancarkan atau memuat semula plugin.

| **Parameter** | **Penerangan** | **Nilai yang mungkin** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `theme` | Tema cTrader | `light`, `dark` |
| `symbol` | Simbol aktif (semasa) | `EURUSD`, `GBPJPY`, `USDCAD`, etc |
| `lang` | Bahasa pelanggan cTrader | `ar`, `cs`, `de`, `el`, `en`, `es`, `fr`, `hu`, `id`, `it`, `ja`, `ko`, `ms`, `pl`, `pt`, `ru`, `sk`, `sl`, `sr`, `th`, `tr`, `vi`, `zh` |
| `platform` | Platform tempat cTrader dijalankan | `web`, `windows`, `macos`, `android`, `ios` |
| `placement` | Penempatan tetingkap plugin | `wl_bs`, `so_bs`, `so_eb`, `chart`, `asp_b`, `asp_t`, `tw_t`, `custom_w` |
| `id` | ID plugin unik untuk perlindungan terhadap penyalinan | Contohnya, `17238`, `26047`, `18359`, dll. |

Penerangan penempatan [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/webview-plugins/ms/query-string-parameters/#penerangan-penempatan "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Penempatan** | **Penerangan** | **Platform** | **Gunakan simbol aktif (`symbol`) dalam rentetan pertanyaan**? |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `wl_bs` | Helaian bawah tab dagangan | `android`, `ios` | Tidak |
| `so_bs` | Helaian bawah gambaran keseluruhan simbol | `android`, `ios` | Ya  |
| `so_eb` | Blok terbenam gambaran keseluruhan simbol | `android`, `ios` | Ya  |
| `chart` | Ruang carta | `web`, `windows`, `macos` | Tidak |
| `asp_b` | Blok ASP | `web`, `windows`, `macos` | Ya  |
| `asp_t` | Tab ASP | `web`, `windows`, `macos` | Ya  |
| `tw_t` | Tab Pantau Dagangan | `web`, `windows`, `macos` | Tidak |
| `custom_w` | Tetingkap tersuai | `web`, `windows`, `macos` | Tidak |

Nota

Bagi melindungi harta intelek anda dan mencegah berlakunya penyalinan, anda boleh melaksanakan satu mekanisme yang mewajibkan plugin anda menghantar ID unik plugin (`id`) melalui parameter `GET` semasa dilancarkan. Sahkan `id` setiap kali plugin dijalankan, dan sekat plugin daripada dilaksanakan sekiranya `id` plugin tersebut tidak sepadan dengan nilai yang dijangkakan.

Contoh [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/webview-plugins/ms/query-string-parameters/#contoh "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Contoh mudah (tanpa simbol)

`https://example.com/ctrader_web_app_plugin?theme=dark&lang=en&platform=web&placement=chart&id=abc123`

Mudah alih, tema cerah, Bahasa Portugis dan EURUSD sebagai simbol aktif

`https://example.com/ctrader_web_app_plugin?theme=light&symbol=EURUSD&lang=pt&platform=android&placement=wl_bs&id=def456`

Desktop dengan blok ASP, tema gelap, Bahasa Jerman dan GBPJPY sebagai simbol aktif

`https://example.com/ctrader_web_app_plugin?theme=dark&symbol=GBPJPY&lang=de&platform=windows&placement=asp_b&id=xyz789`

Kembali ke atas

---

# วิธีการทำงานของดีพลิงก์ - ดีปลิงก์ cTrader

 

[ข้ามไปที่เนื้อหา](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/th/how-deeplinks-work/#_1)

ดีปลิงก์ทำงานอย่างไร[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/th/how-deeplinks-work/#_1 "Permanent link")

===============================================================================================================

ฟังก์ชันและเงื่อนไขของดีปลิงก์ [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/th/how-deeplinks-work/#_2 "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ดีปลิงก์ทั้งหมดที่อธิบายในเอกสารนี้เป็นแบบสัมพัทธ์กับ URL ที่ใช้โฮสต์แอปพลิเคชัน cTrader ของคุณ โดยทั่วไป URL เหล่านี้จะเป็นไปตามรูปแบบ `app.{brokerName}.com` หรือ `ct.{brokerName}.com` โดย `brokerName` คือชื่อที่กำหนดไว้ล่วงหน้าของโบรกเกอร์เฉพาะ

ตัวอย่าง: เปิดบัญชีจริง

ลิงก์ `https://app.ctrader.com/accounts/create-live` นำไปสู่หน้าจอการสร้างบัญชีจริงในแอปพลิเคชัน cTrader ที่ไม่มีแบรนด์

ดีปลิงก์ส่วนใหญ่เป็น [**ข้ามแพลตฟอร์ม**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/th/cross-platform-deeplinks/)
 ซึ่งหมายความว่าพวกมันยังคงฟังก์ชันการทำงานไม่ว่าจะเปิดบนแพลตฟอร์มใดก็ตาม อย่างไรก็ตาม ดีปลิงก์บางอันเป็น [**มือถือเท่านั้น**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/th/mobile-only-deeplinks/)

ในกรณีที่ผู้ใช้ที่ไม่ได้ติดตั้ง cTrader Mobile บนอุปกรณ์ของตนพยายามเปิดดีปลิงก์ พวกเขาจะถูกนำไปยังวิธีการดาวน์โหลด cTrader Mobile เฉพาะแพลตฟอร์มของตน หลังจากติดตั้งและเปิดแอปพลิเคชันแล้ว และผู้ใช้เข้าสู่ระบบด้วยบัญชีใดบัญชีหนึ่งของตน พวกเขาจะถูกนำไปยังหน้าจอที่ดีปลิงก์นำไปในตอนแรก

โปรดทราบว่า UX ของ cTrader แตกต่างกันระหว่างแอปพลิเคชันมือถือและเว็บ พิจารณาตัวอย่างต่อไปนี้

*   เมื่อคลิกปุ่ม **ส่งคำสั่ง** ผู้ใช้ cTrader Web จะถูกนำไปยังหน้าต่าง **คำสั่งใหม่**
*   เมื่อแตะ **คำสั่งใหม่** ผู้ใช้ cTrader Mobile จะถูกนำไปยังหน้าจอ **สร้างคำสั่ง**

เมื่อผู้ใช้ไปที่ลิงก์ `https://app.ctrader.com/orders/create-market-order` บนเว็บ พวกเขาจะเห็นหน้าต่าง **คำสั่งใหม่** ที่แจ้งให้ส่งคำสั่ง Market บนมือถือ ผู้ใช้จะถูกนำไปยังหน้าจอ **สร้างคำสั่ง** ที่อนุญาตให้ส่งคำสั่ง Market แทน

กล่าวอีกนัยหนึ่ง ดีปลิงก์ทำงานได้อย่างถูกต้องโดยไม่คำนึงถึงความแตกต่างด้าน UX ระหว่าง cTrader Web และมือถือ เอกสารนี้ใช้คำศัพท์เช่นกล่องโต้ตอบ **สร้างคำสั่ง Market** เป็นสัญลักษณ์ร่วมเพื่อแสดงถึงฟังก์ชันที่คล้ายกันระหว่างแอปพลิเคชันเหล่านี้

ดีปลิงก์ cTrader และ OAuth ของโบรกเกอร์ [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/th/how-deeplinks-work/#ctrader-oauth "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ในกรณีที่แอปพลิเคชัน cTrader ใช้โฟลว์ OAuth [**ลิงก์ข้ามแพลตฟอร์ม**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/th/cross-platform-deeplinks/)
 ทั้งหมดจะเปิดหน้าจอ OAuth ที่มีแบรนด์ที่ถูกต้องเมื่อเปิดโดย cTrader Web

เมื่อเปิดโดยใช้ cTrader Mobile ดีปลิงก์ cTrader จะแสดงกล่องโต้ตอบ cTrader ปกติแทนที่จะเป็นหน้าจอ OAuth ที่มีแบรนด์

กลับไปด้านบนสุด

---

# Pautan khusus merentas platform - Deeplink cTrader

 

[Langkau tajuk talian](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/ms/cross-platform-deeplinks/#pautan-khusus-ctrader-merentas-platforms)

Pautan khusus cTrader merentas platforms[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/ms/cross-platform-deeplinks/#pautan-khusus-ctrader-merentas-platforms "Permanent link")

===============================================================================================================================================================================

Dalam panduan ini, kami menentukan pautan khusus cTrader yang berfungsi untuk cTrader Web dan Mobile. Pautan khusus ini dikelompokkan berdasarkan ruang dalam cTrader yang dituju oleh pedagang.

Harap maklum bahawa setiap pautan yang disenaraikan di halaman ini boleh mempunyai parameter pertanyaan tambahan seperti berikut.

| Parameter | Nilai yang mungkin | Definisi |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `?acc` | Nombor akaun yang sah. | Jika parameter ini dimasukkan, cTrader akan bertukar kepada akaun dengan nombor yang dinyatakan sebelum meneruskan ke ruang yang ditetapkan dalam pautan khusus. |
| `?lang` | Kod negara dua huruf Alpha-2 (ISO 3166-1) yang sah. | Jika parameter ini dimasukkan, cTrader akan menukar Antara Muka Pengguna (UI) kepada bahasa yang dinyatakan sebelum meneruskan ke ruang yang ditetapkan dalam pautan khusus. |

Nota

Beberapa pautan khusus termasuk nilai yang dinyatakan dalam kurungan ikal (cth., `/orders/create-market-order/{symbol}`). Nilai-nilai ini membolehkan penentuan lebih tepat bagi ruang yang pengguna akan dialihkan apabila mereka mengklik pautan khusus. Sebagai contoh, `/orders/create-market-order/{symbol}` memindahkan pengguna ke skrin **Cipta pesanan pasaran** untuk simbol yang nama sepadan dengan teks yang ditaip menggantikan `{symbol}`. Harap maklum bahawa kurungan ikal hanya digunakan sebagai contoh; tidak termasuk dalam pautan khusus sebenar.

Menu utama [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/ms/cross-platform-deeplinks/#menu-utama "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Pautan | Definisi |
| --- | --- |
| `/finder` | Membuka tab **Semua simbol**. |
| `/watchlists` | Membuka tab **Senarai pantau**. |
| `/symbols/filter/{filterText}` | Membuka tab **Semua simbol** dengan simbol yang ditapis untuk dipadankan dengan teks yang dinyatakan dalam `{filterText}`. |

Maklumat simbol dan carta [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/ms/cross-platform-deeplinks/#maklumat-simbol-dan-carta "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Pautan | Definisi |
| --- | --- |
| `/symbols/{symbol}/info` | Membuka **Maklumat simbol/Gambaran keseluruhan simbol** untuk simbol yang sepadan dengan `{symbol}`. |
| `/symbols/{symbol}/chart` | Membuka carta dagangan baharu untuk simbol yang sepadan dengan `{symbol}`. Jika carta sedemikian sudah dibuka, carta tersebut akan diaktifkan. |

Pantau Dagangan [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/ms/cross-platform-deeplinks/#pantau-dagangan "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Pautan | Definisi |
| --- | --- |
| `/positions` | Membuka tab **Posisi** dalam **Pantau Dagangan**. |
| `/orders` | Membuka tab **Pesanan** dalam **Pantau Dagangan**. |
| `/history` | Membuka tab **Sejarah** dalam **Pantau Dagangan**. |
| `/deals` | Membuka tab **Sejarah** dalam **Pantau Dagangan**. Menduplikasi `/history`. |
| `/transactions` | Membuka tab **Transaksi** dalam **Pantau Dagangan**. |
| `/news` | Membuka tab **Berita** dalam **Pantau Dagangan**. |
| `/bonus` | Membuka tab **Bonus** dalam **Pantau Dagangan**. |

Akaun [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/ms/cross-platform-deeplinks/#akaun "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Pautan | Definisi |
| --- | --- |
| `/accounts/sign-in` | Membuka pemilih akaun. |
| `/accounts/sign-up-demo` | Membuka skrin **Akaun dagangan demo baharu**. |
| `/accounts/create-demo` | Membuka skrin **Akaun dagangan demo baharu**. |
| `/accounts/create-live` | Membuka skrin **Akaun dagangan langsung baharu**. |

Buat pesanan baharu [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/ms/cross-platform-deeplinks/#buat-pesanan-baharu "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Pautan | Definisi |
| --- | --- |
| `/orders/create-market-order` | Membuka skrin **Buat pesanan pasaran** untuk simbol dengan carta yang sedang aktif. |
| `/orders/create-market-order/{symbol}` | Membuka skrin **Buat pesanan pasaran** untuk simbol yang sepadan dengan `{symbol}`. |
| `/orders/create-limit-order` | Membuka skrin **Buat pesanan had** untuk simbol dengan carta yang sedang aktif. |
| `/orders/create-limit-order/{symbol}` | Membuka skrin **Buat pesanan had** untuk simbol yang sepadan dengan `{symbol}`. |
| `/orders/create-stop-order` | Membuka skrin **Buat pesanan henti** untuk simbol dengan carta yang sedang aktif. |
| `/orders/create-stop-order/{symbol}` | Membuka skrin **Buat pesanan henti** untuk simbol yang sepadan dengan `{symbol}`. |
| `/orders/create-stop-limit-order` | Membuka skrin **Buat pesanan henti had** untuk simbol dengan carta yang sedang aktif. |
| `/orders/create-stop-limit-order/{symbol}` | Membuka skrin **Buat pesanan henti had** untuk simbol yang sepadan dengan `{symbol}`. |

Ubah suai pesanan dan maklumat pesanan [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/ms/cross-platform-deeplinks/#ubah-suai-pesanan-dan-maklumat-pesanan "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Pautan | Definisi |
| --- | --- |
| `/orders/modify` | Membuka skrin **Ubah suai pesanan** untuk pesanan pertama dalam senarai **Pesanan**. |
| `/orders/{id}/modify` | Membuka skrin **Ubah suai pesanan** untuk pesanan dengan pengecam yang sepadan dengan `{id}`. |
| `/orders/{id}/details` | Membuka skrin **Maklumat pesanan** untuk pesanan dengan pengecam yang sepadan dengan `{id}`. |

Posisi [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/ms/cross-platform-deeplinks/#posisi "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Pautan | Definisi |
| --- | --- |
| `/positions/modify` | Membuka skrin **Ubah suai posisi** untuk posisi pertama dalam senarai **Posisi**. |
| `/positions/{id}/modify` | Membuka skrin **Ubah suai posisi** untuk posisi dengan pengecam yang sepadan dengan `{id}`. |
| `/positions/{id}/details` | Membuka skrin **Maklumat posisi** untuk posisi dengan pengecam yang sepadan dengan `{id}`. |
| `/positions/{id}/protect` | Membuka skrin **Perlindungan lanjutan** untuk posisi dengan pengecam yang sepadan dengan `{id}`. |

Dana [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/ms/cross-platform-deeplinks/#dana "Permanent link")

| `/funds/deposit` | Membuka skrin **Deposit**. |
| `/funds/fundonline` | Membuka skrin **Deposit**. |
| `/funds/bankwire` | Membuka skrin **Deposit**. |

Copy [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/ms/cross-platform-deeplinks/#copy "Permanent link")

| `/copy/strategy/{strategyID}` | Membuka halaman strategi untuk strategi dengan pengecam yang sepadan dengan `{strategyID}`. |
| `/copy/account/{accountID}` | Membuka halaman statistik untuk akaun dengan nombor yang sepadan dengan `{accountID}`. |

# วงจรชีวิตของปลั๊กอิน WV - ปลั๊กอิน WebView

 

[ข้ามไปที่เนื้อหา](https://help.ctrader.com/webview-plugins/th/wv-plugin-lifecycle/#webview)

คำเตือน

คุณลักษณะนี้อยู่ในขั้นตอนก่อนการเปิดตัวและกำลังอยู่ระหว่างการทดสอบ เอกสารนี้มีไว้เพื่อการอ้างอิงเท่านั้น

วงจรชีวิตปลั๊กอิน WebView[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/webview-plugins/th/wv-plugin-lifecycle/#webview "Permanent link")

========================================================================================================================

ปลั๊กอิน WebView ทุกตัวผ่านขั้นตอนต่างๆ หลายขั้นตอน โดยมีหลายฝ่ายเกี่ยวข้องตลอดทาง

    graph TB
      A([สร้างเว็บแอป]) ==> B([สร้างปลั๊กอิน WV]);
      B ==> C([เผยแพร่ในสโตร์]);
      C ==> D([เพิ่มจากสโตร์]);
      D ==> E([เข้าถึงในแอป cTrader ทั้งหมด<br>พร้อมการซิงค์บนคลาวด์]);
      E ==> F([ใช้งานปลั๊กอิน WV]);
    
      %% เส้นทางสำรองจากการสร้างด้วยลูกศรประ
      B -.-> B1([เพิ่มไปยังแอป cTrader ของคุณ]);
      B1 -.-> B2([แชร์ผ่านการเชิญ]);
      B2 -.-> E;

1.  นักพัฒนาสร้างเว็บแอปโดยใช้[**เมธอด API**](https://help.ctrader.com/webview-plugins/th/references/public-server-message/)
     ที่ช่วยให้สามารถสื่อสารกับ cTrader ได้ จากนั้นโฮสต์บริการบนโดเมนแยกต่างหาก
    
2.  โดยใช้ URL ของบริการที่โฮสต์ไว้ ผู้ใช้[**สร้างปลั๊กอิน WV**](https://help.ctrader.com/webview-plugins/th/how-tos/build-wv-plugins/)
     ใน cTrader Web, Windows หรือ Mac
    
    หมายเหตุ
    
    หลังจากสร้างปลั๊กอิน WV แล้ว ผู้ใช้สามารถเลือกที่จะเพิ่มลงในแอป cTrader ของตนเองเท่านั้นเพื่อการทดสอบ
    
    เคล็ดลับ
    
    พาร์ทเนอร์ (IBs) สามารถแชร์ปลั๊กอิน WV ของตนผ่าน [**cTrader Invite**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-invite/th)
     ได้อย่างง่ายดายเพื่อดึงดูดนักเทรดเพิ่มเติมและเพิ่มการแปลงผู้แนะนำ
    
3.  ผู้ใช้เผยแพร่ปลั๊กอิน WV ใน [**cTrader สโตร์**](https://ctrader.com/webview-plugins)
     เพื่อการกระจายที่กว้างขวางและมีประสิทธิภาพในชุมชนการเทรด
    
4.  นักเทรดคนอื่นๆ [**เพิ่มปลั๊กอิน WV**](https://help.ctrader.com/webview-plugins/th/how-tos/add-wv-plugins/)
     จาก cTrader สโตร์ไปยังแอป cTrader ใดก็ได้ของพวกเขา
    
5.  เมื่อเพิ่มแล้ว ปลั๊กอิน WV จะสามารถเข้าถึงได้ในแอป cTrader ทั้งหมดของนักเทรดผ่านการซิงค์คลาวด์อัตโนมัติ
    
6.  นักเทรด [**ใช้ปลั๊กอิน WebView**](https://help.ctrader.com/webview-plugins/th/how-tos/access-wv-plugins/)
     เพื่อรับประโยชน์จากประสบการณ์การเทรดที่ดีขึ้น เป็นส่วนตัวมากขึ้น และสะดวกสบายมากขึ้น
    

กลับไปด้านบนสุด

---

# Daftar menggunakan akaun media sosial - cTrader ID

 

[Langkau tajuk talian](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/ms/sign-in-with-the-social-accounts/#google)

Daftar menggunakan akaun media sosial
=====================================

Sebagai alternatif, anda boleh menggunakan akaun Google atau Apple sedia ada anda untuk mencipta [**cTID**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/ms/)
.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/create-new-ctid-sign-up.png)

Nota

Apabila anda mendaftar menggunakan akaun Google anda, cTID anda akan dicipta berdasarkan kelayakan Google anda. cTrader tidak akan sekali-kali menyiarkan atau menerbitkan apa-apa pada akaun media sosial anda, dan aktiviti dagangan anda tidak akan dipaparkan di media sosial.

Google [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/ms/sign-in-with-the-social-accounts/#google "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Untuk mendaftar menggunakan akaun Google, klik butang **Google** dalam tetingkap **Log masuk/Daftar**.

Jika anda sudah log masuk ke akaun Google, anda akan diminta untuk mengesahkan menggunakan akaun media sosial anda. Jika tidak, Google akan memaparkan gesaan untuk anda memasukkan kelayakan anda dan kemudian log masuk.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/google-ctrader-signup.png)

Setelah proses pendaftaran selesai, anda akan log masuk ke cTrader secara automatik. Anda juga akan menerima mesej di alamat Gmail yang dikaitkan, yang mencadangkan agar anda melancarkan cTrader.

Kini, anda boleh [**mengurus tetapan cTID**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/ms/managing-ctid/)
 anda di [**laman web cTID**](https://id.ctrader.com/)
.

Apple [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/ms/sign-in-with-the-social-accounts/#apple "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Nota

Anda hanya boleh mendaftar menggunakan akaun Apple pada peranti iOS.

Untuk mencipta cTID menggunakan akaun Apple, ketik butang **Apple** pada skrin pengesahan cTrader.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/ios-appleid.png)

Pilih pilihan **Kongsi e-mel saya** supaya cTID anda menggunakan alamat e-mel Apple ID anda.

Amaran

Jika anda memilih pilihan **Sembunyikan e-mel saya** semasa mendaftar menggunakan akaun Apple, anda mungkin akan menghadapi isu pengecaman dalam sistem broker dan kesukaran untuk mengakses akaun langsung.

Jika e-mel Apple ID anda disembunyikan, anda akan melihat amaran ini dalam cTrader.

![](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/img/apple-hide-email-ctrader-issues.png)

Kami menyarankan agar anda melengkapkan langkah berikut untuk menyelesaikan isu ini.

1.  Buka tetapan peranti Apple anda dan pilih untuk berhenti menggunakan Apple ID bagi aplikasi cTrader. Lihat [**arahan penuh**](https://support.apple.com/en-us/102571)
    .
    
2.  Buka aplikasi cTrader dan daftar menggunakan akaun Apple sekali lagi.
    
3.  Pilih pilihan **Kongsi e-mel saya** kali ini.
    

Anda akan log masuk ke cTrader secara automatik dan menerima mesej pengesahan di alamat e-mel yang dipautkan ke akaun Apple anda.

Kini, anda boleh [**mengurus tetapan cTID**](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-id/ms/managing-ctid/)
 anda di [**laman web cTID**](https://id.ctrader.com/)
.

Kembali ke atas

---

# Pautan khusus yang khusus untuk mudah alih - Deeplink cTrader

 

[Langkau tajuk talian](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/ms/mobile-only-deeplinks/#pautan-khusus-ctrader-yang-khusus-untuk-mudah-alih)

Pautan khusus cTrader yang khusus untuk mudah alih[¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/ms/mobile-only-deeplinks/#pautan-khusus-ctrader-yang-khusus-untuk-mudah-alih "Permanent link")

================================================================================================================================================================================================

Pautan khusus yang disenaraikan di bawah hanya berfungsi apabila diakses pada peranti mudah alih.

Menu utama [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/ms/mobile-only-deeplinks/#menu-utama "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Pautan | Definisi |
| --- | --- |
| `/price-alerts` | Membuka tab **Pemakluman harga**. |
| `/price-alerts/create/{symbol}` | Membuka skrin **Cipta makluman** untuk simbol yang sepadan dengan `{symbol}`. |
| `/search` | Membuka skrin **Cari dan tambah simbol**. |
| `/symbols` | Membuka tab **Senarai pantau**. |
| `/symbols/add` | Jika **Pasaran popular** ialah senarai pantau yang sedang dibuka (yang merupakan tetapan lalai), pautan tersebut akan membuka tetingkap timbul **Klon pasaran popular**.  <br>Jika mana-mana senarai pantau tersuai sedang dibuka, pautan tersebut akan membuka skrin **Cari dan tambah simbol**. |

Pantau Dagangan [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/ms/mobile-only-deeplinks/#pantau-dagangan "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Pautan | Definisi |
| --- | --- |
| `/deal/{dealID}` | Membuka skrin butiran dagangan untuk dagangan dengan pengecam yang sepadan dengan `{dealID}`. |

Dana [¶](https://help.ctrader.com/ctrader-deeplinks/ms/mobile-only-deeplinks/#dana "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Pautan | Definisi |
| --- | --- |
| `/deposit` | Membuka skrin **Deposit**. |

Kembali ke atas
